KeysToEntries.Slide_Colt1911Slide_Description: The 1911 Government Rail Slide is a precision-engineered component for the Colt 1911 pistol. It enhances durability and performance through high-quality machining, providing an excellent fit and finish.
KeysToEntries.Slide_Colt1911LongSlide6_Description: The Colt 1911 Long Slide is an extended slide designed for increased accuracy and improved sight radius. Crafted with meticulous attention to detail, it provides smooth, reliable action and a refined finish.
KeysToEntries.Slide_Colt1911PortedCustom_Description: The Colt 1911 Custom Ported Slide is a premium upgrade for the 1911 pistol. It features porting to reduce recoil and muzzle rise for faster follow-up shots and improved accuracy.
KeysToEntries.Receiver_AkAkmDustCoverLate_Description: A top dust cover for the AK/AKM series of rifles.
KeysToEntries.Receiver_Ak100SeriesDustCover_Descriptio: This is a dust cover for a stamped AK receiver, specifically the original Russian AK-100 model. It is compatible with Saiga and Arsenal rifles.
KeysToEntries.Receiver_Aks74U_Description: The upper receiver cover for the AKS-74U with an integrated rear sight.
KeysToEntries.Receiver_AkRatnikDustCover_Description: The dust cover for the AK ratnik series is a modernized component designed to enhance the functionality of this advanced assault rifles. It is manufactured by Izhmash and features an integrated Picatinny rail, which provides a stable platform for mounting various optical sights and accessories. This integration significantly improves the rifle's versatility and adaptability in different operational scenarios.
KeysToEntries.Receiver_AkRatnik308DustCover_Descriptio: Designed for the AK-308 rifle, this dust cover features a locking lever to ensure a secure fit which is critical for maintaining stability when mounting optics.
KeysToEntries.Receiver_ZenitcoB33Rail_Description: The B-33 is a dust cover with an integrated Picatinny rail that is compatible with all models of AK assault rifles.
KeysToEntries.Receiver_TwsDogLegRail_Description: A modern dog leg rail dust cover for the AK series of rifles.
KeysToEntries.Receiver_FabPdc_Description: The PDC is an aluminum dust cover that serves as a replacement for AK/AKM assault rifles. It is equipped with a milled Picatinny scope mount and features a patented retention mechanism that allows for manual adjustment. This ensures a consistent retention of sighting zero and allows for a straightforward and rapid drop-in installation.
KeysToEntries.Receiver_NorincoCqA1UpperReceiver_Descri: This AR-15 receiver shares basic functionality with its Western counterparts. However, it is generally considered to be of lower quality.
KeysToEntries.Receiver_M16A1UpperReceiver_Description: The M16A1 Upper Receiver is a vital component of the M16A1 rifle, housing the barrel and operating mechanism. It features a fixed carrying handle with an integrated rear sight, providing durability and essential functionality to the firearm.
KeysToEntries.Receiver_ColtM4UpperReceiver_Description: An upper receiver for the M4 series of rifles. The Picatinny rail allows for the attachment of optics and various additional devices.
KeysToEntries.Receiver_DdA4UpperReceiver_Description: The Daniel Defense A4 Upper Receiver Assembly is designed for personalized construction. Crafted with precision in a cutting-edge manufacturing facility and supported by a satisfaction guarantee, this product is ready for any custom build.
KeysToEntries.Slide_Glock17Slide_Description: The standard slide designed for Glock 9x19 pistols. It serves as a crucial component of the firearm's upper assembly.
KeysToEntries.Slide_Glock17N17ReptileEdcSlide_Descript: The N17 Reptile EDC Slide is a high-performance upgrade for the Glock 17 handgun, designed to improve both its functionality and aesthetics. It features a sleek, reptilian scale-like serration pattern that improves grip and manipulation in various conditions.
KeysToEntries.Slide_Glock17L2dCombatStrippedTyton17_De: A premium slide specifically crafted for the Glock 17 pistol. It offers enhanced performance while also boasting a visually striking design.
KeysToEntries.Slide_Glock17SteelCityArsenalP40Warhawk_: This slide for the Glock 17 draws inspiration from World War II with its captivating design, featuring authentic nose art from the legendary P40 Warhawk aircraft. It showcases meticulous CNC-machined rivet markings, adding an extra level of detail and character to the slide.
KeysToEntries.Slide_Glock17ZaffiriPrecisionStainlessSt: The ZPS.6 combines sleek aesthetics with enhanced performance. Constructed from high-quality stainless steel, this precision-engineered slide offers improved durability and reliability.
KeysToEntries.Slide_Glock17ZevZ17CitadelStrippedSlide_: The ZEV Z17 is a high-quality aftermarket slide designed for the Glock 17 pistol, offering enhanced performance and customization options.
KeysToEntries.Slide_Type33Slide_Description: The TT-33 Tokarev slide originated in the Soviet Union and is made of steel, embodying the rugged reliability synonymous with Soviet firearm design. The slide features distinct serrations at the rear, designed to enhance grip and manipulation under various conditions. It houses the barrel and recoil spring assembly, orchestrating the seamless cycling of the pistol's action. The TT-33 is renowned for its robust construction and timeless design.
KeysToEntries.Slide_Type51Slide_Description: The Type 51 Tokarev slide, originating from China, is made of steel, making it durable and resilient. The serrations at the rear offer enhanced grip during manipulation, and the slide itself houses the barrel and recoil spring assembly, facilitating the cycling of the pistol's action. Its robust construction and straightforward design ensure reliable functionality and ease of operation.
KeysToEntries.Slide_BerettaM9A1_Description: The Beretta M9A1 slide is crafted from durable steel and features an open-top design, which helps prevent jamming by allowing spent casings to eject more freely. This design also contributes to reduced felt recoil and improved cycling reliability.
KeysToEntries.Receiver_Mp5_Description: The MP5 receiver is the central part of Heckler & Koch's submachine gun. It contains essential components such as the bolt assembly and trigger group, ensuring reliable performance in various tactical situations.
KeysToEntries.Receiver_Mp5Sd_Description: The MP5SD receiver is a specialized variant of Heckler & Koch's submachine gun designed for stealth operations with integrated sound suppression. It incorporates precision baffles and ports to minimize muzzle report and flash signature, making it ideal for covert missions.
KeysToEntries.Receiver_SagSvdMLokChassisMk1_Descriptio: This high-performance receiver is an upgrade for the Dragunov SVD, enhancing modularity, ergonomics, and accessory compatibility. Made from lightweight yet durable aluminum, it features M-LOK mounting slots and an improved rail system for optics. It also significantly enhances handling and customization, making the SVD more adaptable for tactical and precision shooting applications.
KeysToEntries.Receiver_SigMcx_Description: The SIG MCX upper receiver is a monolithic aluminum design that serves as the firearm's primary structural component. Unlike conventional AR-15 uppers, the MCX upper integrates the top rail, barrel mounting system, and recoil mechanism into a single, rigid assembly, enhancing durability and performance.
KeysToEntries.Receiver_SvdDustCover_Description: The SVD Dragunov receiver cover is designed to be both durable and lightweight, providing essential protection for the rifle’s internal components.
KeysToEntries.Receiver_ScorpionEvo3_Description: <DEV> The receiver of the Scorpion EVO 3 is crafted from durable, high-strength polymer, which helps keep the firearm lightweight and corrosion-resistant. This receiver is fully ambidextrous, featuring magazine releases, bolt catch levers, and safety selectors on both sides, making it accessible for both right- and left-handed users. It includes integrated Picatinny rails on the top and bottom, allowing for a variety of optic, grip, and accessory options. The modularity of the receiver enhances its adaptability, making the EVO 3 suitable for a range of tactical applications.
KeysToEntries.StockAdapter_AkmZenitco_Description: This adapter is designed for attaching PT-1, PT-1S, PT-3, and PT-3S stocks.
KeysToEntries.StockAdapter_ZenitcoPtAk74M100_Descripti: Designed for attaching PT-1, PT-1S, PT-3, and PT-3S stocks.
KeysToEntries.StockAdapter_Aks74uBufferTube_Descriptio: The AKS-74U Buffer Tube Adapter is a component designed to modify the AKS-74U rifle, allowing for the attachment of AR-15/M4-style buffer tubes and adjustable stocks. This offers greater customization options for adjusting the stock's length and enhancing ergonomics, particularly for tactical applications.
KeysToEntries.StockAdapter_AkBufferTube_Description: The buffer tube adapter serves as a practical accessory engineered to enable the installation of AR-15 style buffer tubes on AK-type rifles. This facilitates the attachment of various AR-15 compatible stocks, granting users increased flexibility in customizing the length-of-pull and stock preferences to suit their needs.
KeysToEntries.StockAdapter_AkmZhukovAdapter_Descriptio: The AKM Zhukov stock adapter is a durable accessory that allows for the installation of Magpul's Zhukov-S stock on AKM rifles. It provides adjustable length-of-pull options and improves firearm handling. The adapter is designed to perform reliably even in harsh conditions, making it a popular choice for AK platform upgrades.
KeysToEntries.StockAdapter_AkmZhukovAdapterFDE_Descrip: The AKM Zhukov stock adapter is a durable accessory that allows for the installation of Magpul's Zhukov-S stock on AKM rifles. It provides adjustable length-of-pull options and improves firearm handling. The adapter is designed to perform reliably even in harsh conditions, making it a popular choice for AK platform upgrades.
KeysToEntries.StockAdapter_CzBren2HkG36_Name: <DEV> CZ Bren 2 HK G36 Stock Adapter
KeysToEntries.StockAdapter_CzBren2HkG36_Description: <DEV> Easily adapt the HK G36 folding stock to your CZ Bren 2 (fits both 2S and 2MS).  machined aluminum stock adapter and high-performance polymer shell deflector offer a seamless fit. The shell deflector is designed for the Bren-G36 stock, providing secure retention when folded. Safety selectors and trigger remain easily accessible, allowing firing while folded.
KeysToEntries.StockAdapter_CzBren21913_Description: <DEV> 1913/Picatinny/Sig type stock or arm brace adapter seamlessly integrates with your CZ Bren 2. It securely attaches any 1913 type stock or brace directly to the upper receiver, eliminating wobble with a single T25 drive screw. Matching the factory handguards' fasteners, it requires minimal maintenance tools.
KeysToEntries.StockAdapter_CzBren2BufferTube_Name: <DEV> CZ Bren 2 Buffer Tube Stock Adapter
KeysToEntries.StockAdapter_CzBren2BufferTube_Descripti: <DEV> CZ Bren 2 Buffer Tube Stock Adapter, designed for seamless integration with your firearm. This adapter allows for easy attachment of a buffer tube stock to your Bren 2 platform. Crafted from durable materials and engineered for precision, it ensures a secure fit without any wobble, thanks to its single T25 drive screw design.
KeysToEntries.StockAdapter_CzBren2Zhukov_Description: <DEV> Adapter for mounting the MAGPUL® ZHUKOV Stock on your CZ Bren 2. It slides on like the factory model but ensures a secure, wobble-free fit with a locking screw that threads into the rear sling bracket screw hole.
KeysToEntries.StockAdapter_ErgoMossberg500590ARStockAd: The Ergo Grips Mossberg 500/590 Adapter is a polymer accessory that fits securely onto the grip of the Mossberg 500 or 590 shotgun. Its ergonomic design provides a comfortable grip, which enhances accuracy and reduces fatigue during extended shooting sessions. The adapter enables easy customization with a variety of accessories.
KeysToEntries.StockAdapter_McxBufferTubeAdapter_Descri: The MCX Buffer Tube Adapter is a specialized accessory designed to enhance the modularity of SIG Sauer MCX rifles. It allows users to replace the factory-installed folding or collapsible stock with a standard AR-15 buffer tube, enabling the attachment of a wide range of AR-15 compatible stocks.
KeysToEntries.StockAdapter_SvdArmacon_Description: The Armacon SVD/Tigr to M4 Stock Adapter is a precision-engineered accessory that enhances the versatility of SVD and Tigr rifles. It replaces the standard fixed stock with an AR-15-style buffer tube assembly, allowing for the attachment of adjustable M4-style stocks. Built from durable materials, it ensures a secure fit without requiring permanent modifications to the rifle.
KeysToEntries.StockAdapter_RemingtonM870MesaTacticalTe: This stock adapter and pistol grip system allows for attaching AR-style collapsible stocks and pistol grips to the M870 shotgun.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_Aks74U_Description: The AKS-74U is a compact, short-barreled variant of the AK-74 assault rifle, developed by the Soviet Union in the late 1970s. With a 210mm barrel and folding metal stock, it is highly portable and ideal for close-quarters combat. Chambered for the 5.45x39mm cartridge, it delivers the firepower of the full-size AK-74 in a more compact form. The weapon’s distinctive muzzle brake reduces recoil and muzzle rise. Favored by paratroopers, vehicle crews, and special forces, it strikes a perfect balance between power and maneuverability.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_Akm_Description: The AKM (Avtomat Kalashnikova Modernizirovanniy) was designed in 1959 as a successor to the renowned AK-47. It represents a significant advancement in the evolution of the AK series of rifles, as it was specifically engineered to streamline manufacturing processes, making it more cost-effective and easier to produce on a large scale. The AKM, chambered in 7.62x39mm, became the standard rifle for the Soviet Army and was widely adopted by most member states of the Warsaw Pact, ensuring its presence across Eastern Europe and beyond. It was exported and produced in many other countries, making it ubiquitous worldwide.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_Akmn_Description: The AKMN is a variant of the AKM that comes equipped with a side rail for use with night vision scopes, as denoted by the 'N' in its name. This model is a popular choice among military forces and armed groups worldwide due to its improved accuracy and versatility.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_Ak74N_Description: The AK-74N is a modified variant of the AK-74 rifle, designed with a side rail for attaching night vision scopes, indicated by the 'N' in its name. It is chambered in 5.45x39mm, offering improved accuracy and versatility, especially in low-light conditions. The side rail enables easy integration of night vision optics, allowing users to operate effectively during nighttime operations.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_Akmsn_Description: The AKMSN is a customized version of the AKMS automatic rifle. It has a dovetail mount for the NSP family of night vision scopes, making it adaptable for low-light conditions and improving visibility during nighttime operations. The foldable stock adds to its practicality and ease of transportation.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_Ak74M_Description: The AK-74M, officially in service since 1991, is a modernized version of the AK-74. It is chambered in 5.45x39mm and is popular with military forces and armed groups worldwide. The 'M' designation indicates modern features, including a reinforced polymer folding stock for enhanced portability and maneuverability. The AK-74M can also include a side rail for attachments, enabling users to integrate different optics or accessories to meet mission requirements.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_Ak12_Description: The AK-12 is a 5.45mm caliber assault rifle that serves as the standard service weapon for the Russian infantry and is a key component of the Ratnik equipment kit developed by Kalashnikov Concern. Designed for modern warfare, the AK-12 boasts enhanced ergonomics and improved accuracy, making it ideal for extended combat scenarios. Notable upgrades include a length-adjustable buttstock for a personalized fit, an ergonomic grip for better handling, and an updated diopter sight that enhances target acquisition. These refinements ensure the AK-12 delivers superior performance across diverse operational environments.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_Ak15_Description: The AK-15 is a modern 7.62mm assault rifle developed by Kalashnikov Concern as part of the Ratnik program. It enhances the firepower of the classic AK series while preserving its renowned reliability. The AK-15 features advanced ergonomics, including a length-adjustable buttstock, improved hand grip, and upgraded sights, making it adaptable to diverse combat situations.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_Ak19_Description: The AK-19 is a modern assault rifle developed by Kalashnikov Concern, chambered in 5.56x45mm NATO. It's a variant of the AK-12, designed to appeal to international markets that use the 5.56mm round. The AK-19 retains the rugged reliability of the AK platform while incorporating modern features such as a lightweight folding and adjustable buttstock, a new ergonomic pistol grip, and an improved safety selector. The rifle also includes a muzzle brake and a Picatinny rail for mounting optics and accessories, making it versatile for various combat scenarios.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_Ak308_Description: The AK-308 is a recent addition to the Kalashnikov family, designed for use with the 7.62x51mm NATO cartridge. It is based on the AK-12 platform but adapted to accommodate the larger NATO round. The AK-308 features modern enhancements such as a folding and adjustable buttstock, an ergonomic pistol grip, and an extended Picatinny rail for optics and accessories. It maintains the renowned reliability and durability of the AK series while offering increased firepower and precision suitable for various tactical and military applications.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_NornicoCQA1_Description: The Norinco CQ A1 is a Chinese replica of the American M4A1 rifle, produced by the state-owned Norinco company. Based on the design of the M4 carbine, it was first introduced for civilian use in China and has since been exported to several countries. This semi-automatic variant is widely available on the civilian market, offering a more affordable alternative to American-made rifles. While the CQ A1 may have some surface finish imperfections compared to its Western counterparts, it is generally built to Mil-Spec tolerances, providing reliable performance and durability.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_ColtM4A1_Description: The M4A1, in service since 1994, is a fully automatic variant of the M4 carbine widely utilized by U.S. special operations forces. This highly regarded rifle offers exceptional performance and reliability, with a selective fire system that allows operators to switch between semi-automatic and fully automatic modes. Its compact size, collapsible stock, and compatibility with various accessories make it ideal for close-quarters combat and versatile for various mission requirements.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_DdMk18_Description: The DDM4 is a high-quality AR-15 platform developed by Daniel Defense. It is considered one of the best-quality AR-15 platforms on the market due to its precise construction and tight tolerances, which make it very reliable and well-performing. The DDM4 is also fielded by US Rangers.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_Sks_Description: The SKS, originating in the Soviet Union, gained global prominence through widespread export and production. Notable for its fixed magazine and foldable bayonet, it lacked select-fire capability and had limited magazine capacity, leading to its replacement by the AK-47 in the Soviet Armed Forces during the 1950s. Despite this, the SKS continued to serve in various Soviet units for years. Soviet production occurred from 1949 to 1958 at the Tula Arsenal and from 1953 to 1954 at the Izhevsk Arsenal, resulting in approximately 2.7 million units. Additionally, millions more were produced under license in China and other Eastern Bloc countries during the Cold War. Its adaptability for guerrilla warfare made it popular among insurgent forces worldwide. Since 1988, the SKS has been widely available in the civilian market in North America, maintaining popularity for hunting and sporting activities.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_Glock17_Description: The Glock 17 is a renowned semi-automatic pistol chambered in 9x19mm Parabellum, designed and manufactured by Glock GmbH. It has gained widespread recognition for its exceptional reliability, durability, and ease of use. With a standard magazine capacity of 17 rounds, the Glock 17 offers ample firepower. Its lightweight polymer frame, combined with a steel slide, ensures resilience and comfortable handling. Trusted by professionals and civilians alike, the Glock 17 is a popular choice for self-defense, law enforcement, and sport shooting due to its robust construction and impressive performance.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_Glock17Olive_Description: The Glock 17 is a renowned semi-automatic pistol chambered in 9x19mm Parabellum, designed and manufactured by Glock GmbH. It has gained widespread recognition for its exceptional reliability, durability, and ease of use. With a standard magazine capacity of 17 rounds, the Glock 17 offers ample firepower. Its lightweight polymer frame, combined with a steel slide, ensures resilience and comfortable handling. Trusted by professionals and civilians alike, the Glock 17 is a popular choice for self-defense, law enforcement, and sport shooting due to its robust construction and impressive performance.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_Type51_Description: The Type 51 Tokarev is based on a steel-framed construction, which ensures durability and longevity. It uses a single-stack magazine that can hold eight rounds of 7.62x25mm Tokarev ammunition. The pistol operates on a simple blowback mechanism, which is known for its reliability and ease of maintenance.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_Mp5_Description: The MP5, or Maschinenpistole 5, is a submachine gun developed by German firearms manufacturer Heckler & Koch (H&K). It gained recognition for its compact design, reliability, and versatility after its introduction in the 1960s. The MP5 is a scaled-down version of the earlier MP4 submachine gun, originating from the successful roller-delayed blowback mechanism pioneered by H&K in the 1950s. The MP5 was originally designed for use by military and law enforcement units in confined spaces and urban environments, where maneuverability and close-range firepower were crucial.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_Mp7A1_Description: The MP7A1, introduced in 2003, represents an enhanced iteration of the original MP7 model. Notable design elements include a redesigned pistol grip with a novel surface texture, a retractable stock of reduced length, and side-mounted Picatinny rails for accessory mounting. The folding iron sights have also been streamlined, resulting in a more compact form factor. The MP7A1 is chambered in 4.6×30mm and is designed for maximum firepower in close-quarters combat, offering high armor penetration with low recoil. It has gained recognition for its versatility, compact size, and effectiveness in both military and law enforcement operations.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_Mp7A2_Description: The MP7A2, introduced as the latest evolution of the MP7 series, builds upon the original MP7's design with several significant upgrades. These include an improved ergonomic pistol grip, an ambidextrous selector switch for increased versatility, and an enhanced trigger design for better control during rapid fire. The MP7A2 retains the compact and lightweight profile of its predecessor, chambered in 4.6×30mm, while incorporating a fully adjustable stock for greater stability. The addition of a redesigned handguard allows for improved mounting of accessories, while the upgraded Picatinny rails offer more options for customization.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_SkorpionVz61_Description: The Škorpion vz. 61, also known as the Vz. 61 Skorpion, is a prime example of a compact Czechoslovak submachine gun known for its reliability and versatility. Introduced in the 1960s, it quickly found its place among security forces and military units due to its compact size and firepower. Manufactured by Česká zbrojovka Uherský Brod between 1963 and 1979 under the official designation Samopal vzor 61, the Škorpion vz. 61 features a distinctive design with a folding stock and forward folding grip, making it exceptionally maneuverable in close-quarters combat situations. Chambered in the .32 ACP (7.65mm Browning) caliber, the Škorpion vz. 61 has a cyclic rate of fire of approximately 850 rounds per minute, providing a potent combination of firepower and controllability. Its compact size and lightweight construction make it suitable for various roles, including personal defense, special operations, and as a backup weapon for vehicle crews and pilots.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_M1A_Description: The M1A, produced by Springfield Armory, Inc., is the semi-automatic civilian version of the military M14 rifle. Chambered in 7.62×51mm NATO (.308 Winchester), it retains the M14’s gas-operated system and rotating bolt but omits the selective-fire capability. The M1A accepts detachable box magazines, typically 20-round, and is available in various configurations with either wooden or synthetic stocks. Known for its accuracy and robust design, it remains a popular choice for target shooting, hunting, and marksmanship competitions.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_Mossberg590_Description: The Mossberg 590 is a pump-action shotgun celebrated for its ruggedness and reliability. It features a 3-inch chamber and is available in various barrel lengths, typically ranging from 18.5 to 20 inches, catering to different preferences and applications. Designed primarily for defensive and tactical purposes, the Mossberg 590 is equipped with a sturdy receiver and a tang-mounted safety, ensuring quick and intuitive operation, particularly in high-pressure situations. Its dual extractors and twin action bars contribute to smooth cycling and dependable performance, even in harsh conditions.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_RemingtonM870_Description: The Remington Model 870 is a classic pump-action shotgun known for its reliability, versatility, and widespread use in various applications such as hunting, sport shooting, and law enforcement. It features a robust and durable design, with a variety of configurations available to suit different preferences and needs. The Model 870 is celebrated for its smooth cycling action, solid construction, and proven performance, making it a popular choice among firearm enthusiasts worldwide.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_BerettaM9A1_Description: The Beretta M9A1, introduced in 2006 as an upgraded version of the M9, is a 9mm semi-automatic pistol. It features a Picatinny rail for accessory mounting, improved grip texturing, a beveled magazine well for faster reloading, and sand-resistant 15-round magazines. Designed for military and law enforcement use, the M9A1 is renowned for its enhanced reliability and adaptability in harsh conditions.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_SigMcx_Description: The SIG MCX is a gas-operated, modular rifle developed by SIG Sauer. It features a short-stroke gas piston system, ensuring reliable suppressed operation across multiple calibers, including .300 Blackout, 5.56×45mm NATO, and 7.62×39mm. The MCX is distinguished by its quick-change barrel system, folding stock, and exceptional adaptability.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_MosinNagant_Description: The Mosin-Nagant Model 1891/30 is a bolt-action rifle that became the standard-issue rifle for the Soviet Union during World War II and beyond. Introduced in 1930, it is an updated version of the original Mosin-Nagant Model 1891, featuring improvements such as a five-round internal magazine and chambered in 7.62x54R cartridge. Renowned for its reliability, the Mosin-Nagant 1891/30 saw extensive service in various conflicts throughout the 20th century. Its affordability and availability have also made it popular among civilian shooters and collectors worldwide.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_MosinNagantSniper_Description: The sniper variant of the Mosin-Nagant Model 1891/30, employed by Soviet snipers during World War II, underwent several modifications for precision shooting. Notably, the rifle featured a modified bolt design to prevent interference with the telescopic sight and two holes in the upper receiver for mounting the sight securely. Despite these alterations, the sniper variant retained the same basic operating mechanism and chambering as the standard infantry rifle. With an extended effective range and enhanced accuracy, it played a vital role in Soviet sniping operations during the war.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_SvdDragunov_Description: The Dragunov sniper rifle is a semi-automatic designated marksman rifle chambered in 7.62×54mmR, developed in the Soviet Union between 1957 and 1963. It was chosen as the winning design from a competition involving three design teams. After extensive field testing in various environmental conditions, Dragunov's rifle was officially adopted in July 1963. An initial pre-production batch of 200 rifles was assembled for evaluation, and serial production began in 1964 at Izhmash, later known as Kalashnikov Concern. Since then, the Dragunov has become a standard squad support weapon in numerous countries, including former Warsaw Pact nations.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_M700_Description: The Remington M700 is an accurate and reliable bolt-action rifle widely used by hunters, law enforcement agencies, and military snipers around the world. With a reputation for precision, the M700 is available in various calibers and configurations to suit different shooting applications, from long-range target shooting to big game hunting.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_ScorpionEvo3_Description: <DEV> The Scorpion EVO 3 is a modern submachine gun manufactured by Česká Zbrojovka (CZ) of the Czech Republic. Known for its compact, lightweight design and ease of control, it's chambered in 9×19mm Parabellum and often used by law enforcement and military units worldwide. The EVO 3 features a polymer frame, ambidextrous controls, and Picatinny rails for mounting accessories, making it highly modular and adaptable for various tactical uses.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_Colt1911_Description: The Colt 1911 is a renowned semi-automatic pistol designed by John Browning and first adopted by the U.S. military in 1911. It is chambered in .45 ACP and is known for its robust design, reliability, and stopping power. The Colt 1911 features a single-action trigger, a 7-round magazine, and a steel frame. It has been a popular choice for military, law enforcement, and civilian use due to its enduring performance and iconic status.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_AkBakelite_Description: A bakelite pistol grip for the AK series of rifles and other compatible firearms.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_ZenitcoRk3_Description: The RK-3 anatomical pistol grip is made of D16T alloy with a wear-resistant protective coating.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_ZenitcoRk9_Description: The RK-9 anatomical pistol grip is made of D16T alloy and features a wear-resistant protective coating.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_MagpulMoeAk_Description: The MOE AK+ Grip features a reinforced polymer body and comfortable, wrap-around rubber overmolding to provide optimal weapon control in challenging environments.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_MagpulMoeAkFDE_Description: The MOE AK+ Grip features a reinforced polymer body and comfortable, wrap-around rubber overmolding to provide optimal weapon control in challenging environments.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_AkRatnik_Description: The Ratnik Pistol Grip is made of durable polymer and has an integrated trigger guard. Designed specifically to be compatible with the Ratnik series, it provides an ergonomic and durable grip for improved handling and control.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_AkPolymer_Description: A polymer pistol grip designed for use with the AK series of rifles and other compatible firearms. It was designed as a replacement for the obsolete bakelite grip.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_ArchangelAkSeries_Description: The Archangel AK-series pistol grip is universally compatible with all AK models. Crafted from robust carbon fiber and glass-reinforced polymer in an olive-drab hue, it prioritizes comfort and weapon retention. Boasting a molded front strap and back strap grooves, this grip enhances control and ergonomic feel for improved handling.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_BerettaM9A1_Description: This classic Beretta M9A1 grip is designed to provide a comfortable and secure hold. Made from durable polymer materials, it offers resistance to wear and environmental factors. The textured surface features checkered patterns, which enhance traction and control during firing.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_Colt1911PlasticGrips_Descript: This grip is designed to fit full-size Colt 1911 pistols and provide a durable, functional replacement or upgrade.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_Colt1911StandardGrips_Descrip: Crafted from high-quality walnut wood, this grip is made using traditional woodworking techniques and is designed to fit full-size Colt 1911 pistols.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_Colt1911TheHiveGrips_Descript: CNC-machined from billet aluminum, this ambidextrous grip is designed to fit full-size 1911 pistols and clones, combining durability with style.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_ColtA2_Description: A polymer pistol grip for the AR-15 series of rifles and other compatible firearms.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_MagpulMoeGen1_Description: A reliable and ergonomic replacement for the standard AR-15 or AR-10 grip. Constructed with durable polymer, this upgrade enhances control and comfort during handling.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_NorincoCQA1_Description: The Norinco CQA1 pistol grip is intended for use with the Chinese variant of the M4A1 rifle. While it fulfills the same function as pistol grips found in Western versions, some users may perceive it as being of lower quality due to potential differences in materials, ergonomics, and overall construction.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_MagpulMoe_Description: A high-quality polymer grip designed as an upgrade for the AR-15 or M4. Its ergonomic design ensures comfort and improved shooting performance.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_MagpulMoeFDE_Description: A high-quality polymer grip designed as an upgrade for the AR-15 or M4. Its ergonomic design ensures comfort and improved shooting performance.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_MagpulMoeGRAY_Description: A high-quality polymer grip designed as an upgrade for the AR-15 or M4. Its ergonomic design ensures comfort and improved shooting performance.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_Torque_Description: This grip is designed for AR-15 rifles and is both robust and lightweight. Its distinctive skeletal design prioritizes functionality and provides a perfect grip with or without gloves.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_TyrantMod_Description: Combining the classic feel of an AR grip with a modern design, this grip features polymer straps on the front and back, housed in an aerospace-grade 7075 aluminum body. With a black anodized finish, the result is a lightweight, durable solution with uncompromising form and function.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_TyrantModFDE_Description: Combining the classic feel of an AR grip with a modern design, this grip features polymer straps on the front and back, housed in an aerospace-grade 7075 aluminum body. With a black anodized finish, the result is a lightweight, durable solution with uncompromising form and function.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_SigMcx_Description: The SIG MCX Pistol Grip is a high-quality, ergonomic grip designed specifically for the SIG MCX platform. It features a textured surface that improves traction and control, ensuring a secure grip even in demanding conditions.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_DanielDefenseEnhancedAr_Descr: The Daniel Defense Pistol Grip is ideal for the AR-15 platform, with an ergonomic design that ensures superior control and ease of use. Its classic 1911 grip angle allows for a comfortable hand position.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_DanielDefenseEnhancedArBlack_: The Daniel Defense Pistol Grip is ideal for the AR-15 platform, with an ergonomic design that ensures superior control and ease of use. Its classic 1911 grip angle allows for a comfortable hand position.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_DanielDefenseEnhancedArMilSpe: The Daniel Defense Pistol Grip is ideal for the AR-15 platform, with an ergonomic design that ensures superior control and ease of use. Its classic 1911 grip angle allows for a comfortable hand position.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_Type51Grips_Description: This grip is typically made of durable polymer or plastic materials, providing users with a reliable and cost-effective solution. The straightforward design offers a comfortable and secure hold on the firearm, improving control and accuracy during shooting. The basic Type 51 grip is simple yet practical, ensuring functionality and reliability without sacrificing performance.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_Type51WoodenGrip_Description: This Type 51 Tokarev wooden grip enhances the firearm's aesthetics and functionality. Made from quality hardwood, it provides a comfortable and secure hold, promoting control and accuracy. The grip's timeless design and durable construction add both style and practicality to the pistol.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_Vz61Polymer_Description: A lightweight and durable grip designed for the Vz. 61 Skorpion submachine gun. It enhances ergonomics and control for the shooter, providing comfortable and stable handling during firing.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_Vz61Wooden_Description: The wooden pistol grip for the Vz. 61 Skorpion submachine gun offers a classic aesthetic and ergonomic comfort. Crafted from durable wood, it evokes a traditional feel while enhancing control and handling during use.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_ScorpionEvo3_Description: <DEV> The CZ Scorpion EVO 3 basic pistol grip is a standard ergonomic grip designed for comfort and control on the CZ Scorpion EVO 3 platform. It provides a secure, non-slip texture to help enhance handling and stability during operation. This grip is lightweight and easy to install
KeysToEntries.GasBlock_Akm6P1Sb12GasTube_Description: A standard gas tube compatible with the AK-74 series of rifles. It channels gas from the fired cartridge to a mechanism that disposes of the spent case and inserts a new cartridge into the chamber.
KeysToEntries.GasBlock_Ak74GasTube_Description: The gas tube of the AK-74 rifle is a crucial component that is situated above the barrel. It operates the rifle's gas-operated action by channeling propellant gasses to drive the piston, cycle the action, and aid in the extraction and ejection of spent cartridges.
KeysToEntries.GasBlock_Aks74UGasTube_Description: The AKS-74U gas tube is a critical component that conducts gas from the barrel to the piston, facilitating the cycling of the rifle. It is designed to withstand high temperatures and pressures, ensuring reliable performance under rapid-fire conditions.
KeysToEntries.GasBlock_AkRatnikGasTube_Description: The Ratnik gas tube is a key component of the AK Ratnik series of rifles. It directs gas from the fired cartridge to the gas piston, which drives the bolt carrier backward to cycle the action.
KeysToEntries.GasBlock_Aks74UOpticMount_Description: The Optic Mount for the AKS-74U offers a reliable solution for mounting optics. Based on the proven M1-B and M2-B designs, it fits AK rifles with similar gas system lengths. The mount clamps securely to the barrel, ensuring maximum stability and accuracy, and is compatible with most low-mount tube reflex sights. Replacing the gas tube and upper handguard assembly, it provides the lightest and lowest profile available.
KeysToEntries.GasBlock_StandardM4A1_Description: A standard gas block for the M4A1 carbine. As an essential component, it effectively regulates the flow of gas from the fired cartridge to ensure proper cycling of the weapon's mechanism. It also features a front sight post.
KeysToEntries.GasBlock_StandardCQA1_Description: The standard CQA1 gas block is a component found in the Chinese version of the AR-15 rifle. While it performs the same function as the gas blocks in Western versions, it may be perceived as lower quality due to potential differences in materials, machining, and overall construction.
KeysToEntries.GasBlock_DdMk12LowProfile_Name: DD MK12 Low Profile Gas Block
KeysToEntries.GasBlock_DdMk12LowProfile_Description: Crafted by Daniel Defense, this gas block ensures reliable gas regulation for optimal performance and accuracy. With its low-profile design, it offers a sleek and streamlined appearance, reducing weight and improving overall firearm balance.
KeysToEntries.GasBlock_Jpgs10D_Description: The JPGS-10D is a small and compact design that can fit under various handguard models available on the market. Its two-part structure allows for easy installation, even on barrels with pin-and-weld muzzle treatments.
KeysToEntries.GasBlock_Jpgs6_Description: The JPGS-6 model is dial-adjustable small bore design intended facilitate easy transitioning between suppressed and unsuppressed fire on large-frame rifles.
KeysToEntries.GasBlock_SigMcx_Description: The SIG MCX series utilizes a short-stroke gas piston system combined with a dual recoil spring mechanism, designed to reduce recoil and enhance reliability.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_BerettaM9A1Standard_Description: The standard barrel for the Beretta M9 model is chambered in 9×19mm Parabellum. It measures approximately 125 millimeters (4.9 inches) and contributes to the pistol's overall length of 217 millimeters. The barrel's dimensions are meticulously engineered to balance accuracy and portability.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_BerettaM9A1Threaded_Description: A standard threaded barrel for the Beretta M9 model is an extended barrel designed to accommodate muzzle devices such as suppressors or compensators. These barrels are distinguished by a 1/2x28 thread pitch, a prevalent standard for 9mm firearms.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_Colt1911_45Acp_Description: The Colt 5" .45 ACP Stainless Barrel is made from durable stainless steel and is precisely designed to fit the Colt 1911 pistol chambered in .45 ACP.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_Colt19116inch_45Acp_Description: Made from 416R-certified stainless steel, this barrel is CNC-machined with precise fit points on the back of the receiver and the bottom of the feet, allowing for accurate lock-up and improved performance with simple hand-file fitting.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_Colt1911Threaded_45Acp_Descriptio: The Colt 1911 Threaded Barrel in .45 ACP comes complete with a thread cap and offers compatibility with Government size 1911s with an overall length of 5.75 inches.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_M1A16inch_762x51_Description: This 16.25-inch steel barrel is designed for the SOCOM-16 variant of the M1A and is chambered in .308 Winchester/7.62×51 NATO. Its shorter length makes it well-suited for close-quarters use while maintaining reliable accuracy and durability.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_M1A185inch_762x51_Description: This 18.5-inch mid-length steel barrel is designed for the Springfield M1A Scout Squad and is chambered in 7.62×51 NATO. It balances maneuverability with ballistic performance, providing better velocity and range than the 16″ SOCOM barrel while remaining more compact than the full 22″ model.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_M1A22inch_762x51_Description: The full-length 22-inch steel barrel is used on the Standard and Loaded M1A models. Chambered in 7.62×51 NATO, it provides optimal velocity and long-range performance while preserving the traditional M14 profile. It typically includes a flash suppressor and is valued for its combination of precision, durability, and classic military styling.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_SigMcx16inch_300AC_Description: The 16-inch barrel for the SIG MCX, chambered in .300 Blackout, is engineered to optimize the rifle's performance for intermediate to long-range engagements. This barrel length enhances muzzle velocity and accuracy.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_SigMcx675inch_300AC_Description: The 6.75-inch barrel for the SIG MCX, chambered in .300 Blackout, is engineered for ultra-compact configurations, making it ideal for close-quarters scenarios and personal defense. Despite its shorter length, it delivers reliable performance and is optimized for subsonic ammunition, making it perfect for suppressed shooting.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_SigMcx9inch_300AC_Description: The 9-inch barrel for the SIG MCX, chambered in .300 Blackout, strikes an optimal balance between compactness and ballistic performance. Its length is well-suited for the .300 Blackout cartridge, providing effective muzzle velocity and energy retention, making it ideal for both suppressed and unsuppressed applications.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_Svd620mm_762x54_Description: The SVD 620mm barrel is a chrome-lined, hammer-forged component designed for exceptional durability and accuracy. Chambered for 7.62×54mmR, it optimizes velocity and effective range. The 24.4-inch (620mm) length strikes a balance between precision and maneuverability, making it ideal for designated marksman roles. Additionally, the barrel is equipped with a distinctive flash suppressor.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_Ar15105inch_556x45_Description: A 266mm barrel designed for the AR-15 weapon platform. It is compatible with 5.56x45mm cartridges.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_Ar15145inch_556x45_Description: A 370mm barrel for the AR-15 weapon platform. Compatible with 5.56x45mm cartridges.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_Ar1516inch_556x45_Description: A 406mm barrel, specifically designed for the AR-15 weapon platform. It offers compatibility with various 5.56x45mm cartridges.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_Ar1518inch_556x45_Description: A 457mm barrel, specifically designed for the AR-15 weapon platform. It offers compatibility with various 5.56x45mm cartridges.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_Ar1520inch_556x45_Description: This AR-15 barrel boasts a length of 508mm and is specifically crafted for the AR-15 weapon platform. It offers compatibility with various 5.56x45mm cartridges, providing increased accuracy for your firearm.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_Ar15145inch_Norinco_556x45_Descri: The 14.5" (370mm) AR-15 CQA1 barrel is a Chinese variant of the classic AR-15 design. While it offers the familiar functionality and compatibility of the AR-15 platform, it may have lower quality control standards. However, It still provides a compact and maneuverable option for close to medium-range shooting, making it suitable for certain applications where cost-effectiveness is a priority.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_M70018inchThreaded_762x51_Descrip: An 18” threaded barrel for the Remington M700, which is both compact and customizable. The threaded muzzle enables easy attachment of accessories such as suppressors or muzzle brakes, making it a versatile option for those who prioritize maneuverability and personalized firearm setups.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_M70020inchSuppressed_762x51_Descr: This 20” barrel for the Remington M700 comes with a built-in suppressor that features a titanium tube and a single-piece monolithic core. The suppressor is available in two caliber options: .308 or 300 Blackout.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_M70022inchStandart_762x51_Descrip: This 22” barrel for the Remington M700 is precision-crafted for exceptional accuracy and adaptability. Its threaded design allows for muzzle accessories, striking a balance between maneuverability and bullet velocity. This barrel is ideal for hunting and precision shooting, offering both reliability and performance.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_M70022inchVTR_762x51_Description: A 22” barrel for the Remington M700 with a unique triangular profile and built-in muzzle brake. This design delivers both on aesthetics and accuracy, providing a balanced mix of maneuverability and bullet velocity.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_M70026inchHeavy_762x51_Descriptio: This 26” barrel is designed for the Remington 700 series rifles and offers easy installation. It has a tapered profile, making it ideal for target shooting. Crafted from high-quality Chromoly steel alloys, each barrel undergoes a meticulous one-at-a-time process to ensure superb accuracy.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_Mosin514mm_762x54_Description: This barrel for the Mosin-Nagant bolt-action firearm measures approximately 20.24 inches (514mm), making it a compact and maneuverable option. Its shorter length is ideal for close-quarters engagements and improves handling in confined spaces. Although the 514mm barrel sacrifices some muzzle velocity compared to longer-barreled versions, it still maintains the robustness and reliability characteristic of the Mosin-Nagant design. This variant offers a balance between portability and ballistic performance.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_Mosin730mm_762x54_Description: A 730mm (28.74 inch) barrel for the Mosin-Nagant, which contributes to improved muzzle velocity and long-range accuracy. This barrel variant is favored by enthusiasts for its historical significance and ballistic advantages.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_Mossberg500185inch_12Gaug_Descrip: The 18.5” security barrel with a bead sight is a versatile solution for 12 gauge Mossberg 500 and Maverick 88 6-shot models. It has a cylinder bore and matte-blued finish, optimizing it for close-range engagements and rapid target acquisition. The bead sight enhances aiming precision, making it ideal for home defense and tactical applications.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_Mossberg50020inch_12Gaug_Descript: The 20" all-purpose barrel with vent rib is compatible with 12 gauge Mossberg 500 series and Maverick 88 6-shot models. It has a bead sight for quick target acquisition, making it suitable for various shooting scenarios. The smoothbore and matte-blued finish provide reliability and durability.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_Mossberg50020inch1ring_12Gaug_Des: The 20" all-purpose barrel with vent rib is compatible with 12 Gauge Mossberg 500 series and Maverick 88 6-shot models. It has a bead sight for quick target acquisition, making it suitable for various shooting scenarios. The smoothbore and matte-blued finish provide reliability and durability. This is the one-ring variant.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_RemingtonM870185inch_12Gaug_Descr: Crafted from high-quality steel and finished with a non-glare black coating, this barrel is designed specifically for Remington 870 12 gauge shotguns. It offers enhanced versatility and accuracy with its 18.5" length, pre-installed front ramp sight, and compatibility with Rem choke tubes.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_RemingtonM87023inch_12Gaug_Descri: This 23" barrel is compatible with Remington 870 Wingmaster, 870 SPS (Special Purpose), and 870 Express 12 gauge shotguns. It is finished in matte blue and equipped with a silver front sight bead and ventilated rib to enhance performance and accuracy.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_RemingtonM87026inch_12Gaug_Descri: This premium ordinance-grade steel barrel has a sleek satin black finish and is tailored for the Remington 870. It features a 26" length and a pre-installed modified choke tube, providing enhanced versatility and accuracy.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_Type51_762x25_Description: This barrel is typically made of high-grade steel for durability and resistance to wear. It is designed to handle the pressures generated by the 7.62x25mm Tokarev cartridge and has a rifled bore to stabilize the projectiles.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_Type51Threaded_762x25_Description: The Type 51 Tokarev's threaded barrel is made of high-quality steel, providing durability and longevity. This barrel has threading at the muzzle end, allowing for the attachment of muzzle devices like suppressors or compensators. Threaded barrels are designed to withstand the pressures of the 7.62x25mm Tokarev cartridge while maintaining the same precision engineering as standard barrels, providing consistent accuracy and reliability.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_Glock17ZaffiriPrecision_9x19_Desc: A high-quality barrel designed specifically for the Glock 17, engineered with exceptional precision and craftsmanship.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_Glock17ZaffiriPrecisionGoldThread: A premium barrel designed to elevate the performance of the Glock 17 pistol. With its threaded design and striking gold finish, this barrel offers exceptional precision, durability, and a touch of aesthetic appeal for all firearm enthusiasts.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_Glock17Standard_9x19_Description: A standard, factory-made barrel for the Glock 17.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_Glock17ZevOptimizedThreaded_9x19_: Optimized Glock 17 Match Grade Threaded Barrel
Designed specifically for the Glock 17, this threaded barrel variant provides improved performance and reduced recoil.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_ScorpionEvo355inch_9x19_Descripti: <DEV>Designed for the CZ Scorpion EVO 3 Micro, the 5.5-inch barrel offers compact dimensions with a three-arm spiral flash hider for reduced muzzle flash and manageable recoil. This barrel length is ideal for close-quarters, maximizing maneuverability without sacrificing 9mm accuracy at short ranges.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_ScorpionEvo38inch_9x19_Descriptio: <DEV>The 8-inch barrel balances compactness with improved velocity, providing better range and accuracy over shorter barrels. This mid-length option suits those looking for a versatile firearm that is still manageable in tighter spaces but delivers enhanced ballistic performance, making it effective for both personal defense and sport shooting at moderate
KeysToEntries.Handle_StandardcCQA1_Description: The CQ A1 charging handle is designed for the Chinese variant of the AR-15 rifle. While it functions similarly to its Western counterparts, differences in materials, workmanship, and overall construction may affect its perceived quality.
KeysToEntries.Handle_StandardGi_Description: A reliable and versatile charging handle designed for use with the AR-15 weapon platform. Built to industry-standard specifications, this charging handle ensures smooth and efficient operation, allowing for quick and easy manipulation of the bolt carrier group.
KeysToEntries.Handle_GeisseleSch556_Description: The Geissele Super Charging Handle (SCH) offers exceptional reliability and smooth operation.
KeysToEntries.Handle_GeisseleSch556Ddc_Description: The Geissele Super Charging Handle (SCH) offers exceptional reliability and smooth operation. Its Desert Dirt Color (DDC) finish adds a touch of style to any compatible firearm.
KeysToEntries.Handle_GripNRipAr15_Description: The GRIP-N-RIP AR-15 Charging Handle is an ergonomic and durable upgrade for the AR-15 rifle and other compatible firearms. With its enhanced grip design, this charging handle provides improved control and ease of use during weapon manipulation.
KeysToEntries.Handle_AntregAr15_Description: The ANTREG AR-15 Charging Handle is manufactured in the Czech Republic and designed to fit the AR-15 platform firearms. The lever is ambidextrous and features stainless steel springs and reinforced hardened steel pins at the pivot points.
KeysToEntries.Handle_F1Firearms_Description: This ambidextrous charging handle provides a personalized aesthetic and feel, accommodating different shooting preferences and maintaining fast, seamless action from both the dominant and non-dominant sides.
KeysToEntries.Handle_vz61ChargingKnob_Description: The charging knob of the Vz. 61 Skorpion submachine gun is used to retract and release the bolt mechanism, streamlining the process of loading and chambering ammunition.
KeysToEntries.Handle_Bren2_Description: <DEV> The CZ Bren 2 ms charging handle is a sturdy, non-reciprocating handle for manually operating the bolt carrier group. It's ambidextrous and designed for reliable use.
KeysToEntries.Handle_HkMp5CockingHandle_Description: The MP5 cocking handle is a crucial component that allows for manual operation to charge the weapon and chamber a round. It is conveniently located on the left side of the receiver, providing ergonomic access for ambidextrous use and improving handling and control.
KeysToEntries.Handle_AkRp1_Description: The RP-1 is a charging handle made from D16T aluminum alloy that improves the ease of reloading the firearm. It is securely attached to the standard charging handle using the provided screws.
KeysToEntries.Handle_SigMcx_Description: The SIG MCX Charging Handle is an ambidextrous component designed for the SIG MCX rifle platform. It allows users to manually cycle the firearm’s action, chamber rounds, and clear malfunctions efficiently from either side, accommodating both left- and right-handed shooters. Constructed from durable materials, this charging handle ensures reliable performance in various conditions.
KeysToEntries.Auxiliary_Colt1911Hammer_Description: This 1911 pistol hammer ensures reliable ignition and smooth operation.
KeysToEntries.Auxiliary_SvdRearSightRing_Description: The SVD Rear Sight Ring is a critical component of the Dragunov SVD's iron sight system. Designed for precise elevation and windage adjustments to accommodate 7.62×54R ballistics, this graduated, adjustable tangent sight is typically marked from 100 to 1200 meters, allowing users to quickly make range adjustments.
KeysToEntries.Auxiliary_BerettaM9A1Hammer_Description: The Beretta hammer is an integral part of the firing mechanism, serving the primary function of striking the firing pin to initiate the firing process.
KeysToEntries.Auxiliary_SksCoverPin_Description: A metal pin that secures the SKS optical rail in place.
KeysToEntries.Mag_SvdDragunov_10Rnd_762x54_Description: This steel-constructed magazine is designed for the Dragunov SVD and its variants. With a 10-round capacity, it ensures smooth feeding of 7.62×54mmR rounds while maintaining the rifle's precision and reliability. Ideally suited for military and designated marksman use, it balances capacity and maneuverability.
KeysToEntries.Mag_SvdDragunov_20Rnd_762x54_Description: This high-capacity steel magazine is designed for extended engagements with the SVD Dragunov, offering increased firepower. With a 20-round capacity for 7.62×54mmR, it ensures durability and reliability while enhancing the rifle's sustained fire capability.
KeysToEntries.Mag_CzBren2Ms_10Rnd_762x39_Description: <DEV> The CZ bren 2 Magazine 7.62x39mm for 10 rounds, made  from steel for improved durability
KeysToEntries.Mag_CzBren2MsSteel_10Rnd_556x45_Descript: <DEV> The CZ bren 2 Magazine 5.56x45mm for 10 rounds, made  from steel for improved durability
KeysToEntries.Mag_PmagLrSr_20rnd_762x51_Description: The PMAG 20 LR/SR GEN M3 in 7.62x51 NATO (.308 Winchester) is a lightweight, economically efficient, and exceptionally reliable 20-round magazine designed for SR25/M110 pattern rifles. It features advanced impact and crush-resistant polymer construction for next-generation durability.
KeysToEntries.Mag_CzBren2Windowed_30Rnd_762x39_Descrip: <DEV> The CZ Bren 2 7.62x39 30-Round Windowed Magazine is an authentic CZ magazine crafted from lightweight polymer. It includes transparent polymer windows and steel springs to ensure smooth, trouble-free operation with your Bren 2 rifle in 7.62x39mm. Engineered to withstand the most challenging conditions, this magazine is built for durability and reliability.
KeysToEntries.Mag_CzBren2_30Rnd_556x45_Description: <DEV> The CZ Bren 2 Magazine, produced by CZ USA, comes in a black textured finish and includes a window with round count markings. This magazine is designed for 5.56x45 caliber ammunition and can hold a maximum of 30 rounds.
KeysToEntries.Mag_MosinArchangel_10Rnd_762x54_Descript: This is a durable and lightweight black polymer magazine designed specifically for use with the Archangel AA9130 stock. It has a capacity of 10 rounds and is detachable, allowing for efficient and reliable feeding of 7.62x54R ammunition in Mosin-Nagant rifles equipped with the AA9130 stock.
KeysToEntries.Mag_MosinInternalMagazine_5Rnd_762x54_De: The Mosin-Nagant rifle features a lightweight, 5-round internal magazine located beneath the receiver. This magazine is designed to hold up to five cartridges and allows for the manual loading of rounds into the chamber. It can be loaded from the top and is also compatible with stripper clips for faster reloading.
KeysToEntries.Mag_MosinArchangel_10Rnd_762x54_L4_Descr: This is a durable and lightweight black polymer magazine designed specifically for use with the Archangel AA9130 stock. It has a capacity of 10 rounds and is detachable, allowing for efficient and reliable feeding of 7.62x54R ammunition in Mosin-Nagant rifles equipped with the AA9130 stock.
KeysToEntries.Mag_SksOriginal_10Rnd_762x39_Description: The standard SKS internal magazine is a reliable, fixed magazine system that is an integral part of the rifle's design. Built into the firearm, it securely holds 10 rounds of ammunition and provides a consistent and dependable feed for the semi-automatic action.
KeysToEntries.Mag_SksArchangel_35Rnd_762x39_Descriptio: The ProMag Archangel LVX 7.62x39mm 35-round magazine is built for reliable performance in tactical situations. Crafted from durable polymer, it offers resistance to corrosion and long-lasting use. With a chrome silicon wire spring and polymer follower, this magazine maintains consistent alignment for smooth operation in various conditions.
KeysToEntries.Mag_SksArchangelLVLX_20Rnd_762x39_Descri: Constructed from a blend of carbon fiber and glass-reinforced black polymer, this magazine is designed for durability. Its body is made with high-strength materials and features a patented steel lever release for quick, one-handed magazine changes. The textured finish provides improved grip and control during use.
KeysToEntries.Mag_SksArchangel_35Rnd_762x39_L3_Descrip: The ProMag Archangel LVX 7.62x39mm 35-round magazine is built for reliable performance in tactical situations. Crafted from durable polymer, it offers resistance to corrosion and long-lasting use. With a chrome silicon wire spring and polymer follower, this magazine maintains consistent alignment for smooth operation in various conditions.
KeysToEntries.Mag_SksArchangelLVLX_20Rnd_762x39_L2_Des: Constructed from a blend of carbon fiber and glass-reinforced black polymer, this magazine is designed for durability. Its body is made with high-strength materials and features a patented steel lever release for quick, one-handed magazine changes. The textured finish provides improved grip and control during use.
KeysToEntries.Mag_SksArchangelLVLX_20Rnd_762x39_L3_Des: Constructed from a blend of carbon fiber and glass-reinforced black polymer, this magazine is designed for durability. Its body is made with high-strength materials and features a patented steel lever release for quick, one-handed magazine changes. The textured finish provides improved grip and control during use.
KeysToEntries.Mag_BerettaM9A1_15Rnd_9x19_Description: The Beretta M9A1 9mm 15-round magazine is a factory-original accessory designed to ensure optimal performance and reliability for the Beretta pistol. Constructed from durable steel with a corrosion-resistant finish, it is built to withstand strenuous use and harsh environmental conditions.
KeysToEntries.Mag_Pmag20ArM4_20Rnd_556x45_Description: A 20-round polymer magazine for AR-15/M4 compatible weapons. It can be chambered with either 5.56x45mm or .300 AAC Blackout rounds.
KeysToEntries.Mag_Ak15_30Rnd_762x39_Description: The new AK-15 30-round magazine designed for 7.62x39mm rifles boasts a rugged stamped steel AK-15 angled base plate and a unique double-detent mag insert for secure locking. Made from a lightweight, impact-resistant polymer, it offers reliable durability across a range of temperatures.
KeysToEntries.Mag_StanagMag_20Rnd_556x45_Description: A 20-round STANAG magazine designed for use with compatible AR-style firearms. It can be chambered with either 5.56x45mm or .300 AAC Blackout rounds.
KeysToEntries.Mag_Pmag30ArM4_30Rnd_556x45_Description: A 30-round polymer magazine for AR-15/M4 compatible weapons. It can be chambered with either 5.56x45mm or .300 AAC Blackout rounds.
KeysToEntries.Mag_Ar15AtiSchmeisserS60_60Rnd_556x45_De: The S60 ATI Schmeisser magazine has a stunning ammo capacity of 60 rounds, making it useful for full-auto fire and long combat scenarios. It can be chambered with 5.56x45mm or .300 AAC Blackout rounds, and is compatible with AR-style firearms.
KeysToEntries.Mag_StanagMag_30Rnd_556x45_Description: A 30-round STANAG magazine designed for 5.56x45mm NATO/.300 BLK, compatible with AR-style firearms. It is produced in the United States by C Products Defense and features an enhanced design that incorporates a two-part Stainless Steel body. The body undergoes robotic welding to ensure precise control over critical-to-function dimensions, which in turn ensures a proper fit in the magazine well.
KeysToEntries.Mag_DdAr15_32Rnd_556x45_Description: The DD Magazine is constructed with the same high quality and strict standards as Daniel Defense firearms. It offers 32-round capacity for both 5.56x45mm and .300 AAC Blackout rounds, all within the familiar size of industry-standard 30-round magazines. The magazine is compatible with AR-style firearms.
KeysToEntries.Mag_Ar15PmagD60_60Rnd_556x45_Description: The PMAG D-60 is a robust, lightweight, and exceptionally dependable 60-round polymer drum magazine designed for AR15/M4 compatible firearms in 5.56x45 NATO/.223 Remington. Surpassing the capacity of earlier PMAGs, the PMAG D-60 provides shooters with 60 rounds of ammunition, essentially equating to the round count of two standard 30-round magazines without the need for a crucial reload.
KeysToEntries.Mag_Pmag30ArM4GenM3Window_30Rnd_556x45_D: The PMAG 30 GEN M3 Window, a cutting-edge advancement, is a 30-round polymer magazine designed for AR15/M4 compatible firearms chambered in 5.56x45 NATO (.223 Remington). It is equipped with transparent windows, enabling quick visual estimation of the remaining rounds. Beyond its extended features and compatibility, the GEN M3 Window incorporates innovative material technology and manufacturing methods, ensuring heightened strength, durability, and reliability to surpass demanding military performance standards.
KeysToEntries.Mag_Ak15_30Rnd_762x39_L4_Description: The new AK-15 30-round magazine designed for 7.62x39mm rifles boasts a rugged stamped steel AK-15 angled base plate and a unique double-detent mag insert for secure locking. Made from a lightweight, impact-resistant polymer, it offers reliable durability across a range of temperatures.
KeysToEntries.Mag_DdAr15_32Rnd_556x45_L4_Description: The DD Magazine is constructed with the same high quality and strict standards as Daniel Defense firearms. KeysToEntries.Handguard_CzBren2108MLok_Description: <DEV> the HBI 10.8″ handguard for the Bren 2 MS is designed for 11″ barrel models in 556/223 and 7.62×39 calibers. It offers over 2x the support hand area and over 5x the M-Lok positions compared to the factory handguard. It features a full-length continuous 1913/picatinny top rail for mounting IR sight systems and peripheral switches. The Gen 2 handguards have a gas block window for easy access to gas system adjustments and complete disassembly without removing the handguard. They include an integrated QD mounting plate system for sling integration on either side.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_CzBren278MLok_Description: <DEV> HBI offers universal compatibility with CZ Bren 2 MS pistols or rifles with their 7.8″ handguard. It fits all barrel lengths (8″, 9″, 11″, and 14″) in 556/223 and 7.62×39 calibers. Providing nearly 2x the support hand area and over 3x the M-Lok positions compared to the factory handguard. The design allows tool-less access to the gas system adjustment key and features simplified mounting, reducing parts count by 18 pieces. It includes an integrated QD mounting plate system for seamless sling integration.

KeysToEntries.Handguard_M1AUpperWalnut_Description: This walnut upper handguard offers a classic appearance for the M1A. Precision-milled to fit beneath the gas cylinder, it pairs seamlessly with a wooden stock, adding both durability and a comfortable grip while preserving the rifle’s traditional aesthetic.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_RemingtonM870Walnut_Descriptio: The Remington M870 Walnut 12ga Forend handguard is a high-quality accessory that adds both durability and aesthetic appeal to the shotgun. It is designed for easy installation and a secure fit, enhancing the grip and control of the shotgun for comfortable and precise handling.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_RemingtonM870HogueOdGreen_Desc: This forend is constructed from durable rubber and designed for Remington 870 12 gauge shotguns.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_RemingtonM870MagpulMoe_Descrip: The MOE handguard is a seamless upgrade for the M870 12ga shotgun. It features extended length and front/rear hand stops to enhance weapon control, and the M-LOK slots make it compatible with a wide range of accessories.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_RemingtonM870MagpulMoeFDE_Desc: The MOE handguard is a seamless upgrade for the M870 12ga shotgun. It features extended length and front/rear hand stops to enhance weapon control, and the M-LOK slots make it compatible with a wide range of accessories.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_RemingtonM870StrikeIndustriesV: Constructed from robust and lightweight 6061 aluminum, this handguard is tailor-made for Remington Model 870 shotguns in 12 gauge.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_M700ModX_Description: The MODX Handguard is a versatile accessory designed for military, law enforcement, and hunting applications. It is specifically tailored to complement the Remington Model 700, providing a lightweight and ergonomic solution.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_MossbergForearm_Description: This durable synthetic forearm is designed for 12 gauge shotguns, providing reliable performance and a lightweight feel.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_MossbergTriRail_Description: The Shotgun Forearm, Tri-Rail, Synthetic, 12 Gauge is a durable and versatile accessory for 12 gauge shotguns. It is constructed from synthetic materials and features a tri-rail design, which provides ample space for mounting various accessories such as lights, lasers, or vertical grips.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_MossbergMagpulMoe_Description: The MOE M-LOK Forend is designed as a simple replacement for Mossberg 590/590A1 12ga shotguns. It has an elongated design and front/rear hand stops to improve weapon control and maneuverability. The Forend is equipped with M-LOK slots, making it compatible with a wide range of M-LOK accessories.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_Mp5WideForearm_Description: This polymer handguard is designed to match factory HK specifications in the USA for all MP5 & HK94 variants. Also known as the tropical wide forearm, it is marked 'US' inside to verify its compliance with US regulations. Constructed from glass-filled polymer, it matches the quality of its HK German counterparts.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_Mp5SdForearm_Description: This forearm is designed to fit over the metal shroud of the front end of the MP5SD. It is manufactured by HK in Germany to ensure high factory quality, superior performance, and durability, making it a reliable choice for any MP5SD configuration.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_Mp5BTl99A13Rail_Name: B&T HK MP5 TL-99A1 3 Rail Handguard
KeysToEntries.Handguard_Mp5BTl99A13Rail_Description: The B&T TL-99A1 3 Rail Handguard is a tactical accessory designed to enhance the MP5. With three additional rails, it allows for the attachment of accessories like optics, lights, or grips, allowing users to customize their weapon for various applications.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_Mp5SdBtBt21343TriRail_Name: B&T BT-21343 HK MP5SD Tri-Rail Handguard
KeysToEntries.Handguard_Mp5SdBtBt21343TriRail_Descript: This handguard, tailored for the HK MP5SD, is crafted in Switzerland by B&T. It boasts three Picatinny rails positioned at the 3, 6, and 9 o'clock positions, ensuring great versatility and reliability.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_Mp5EmaX5Aluminum5rail_Descript: The EMA X5 Aluminum 5-rail is a top-tier rail system for the MP5. Its design includes a front-sight mounting feature, ensuring consistent zero retention even during intense use. This versatile system allows for the attachment of forearm grips, lights, lasers, and additional mounts, offering unparalleled customization options. The Command Arms Accessories Picatinny Rail Hand Guard is built in two pieces and secured with screws, providing reliable performance and adaptability for any mission.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_SigMcx10_Description: The SIG MCX 10-inch handguard strikes an optimal balance between compactness and available space for accessories. It enhances the rifle's modularity by providing additional M-LOK slots for customization, all while preserving the firearm's maneuverability.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_SigMcx12SD_Description: The SIG MCX 12-inch SD Handguard is designed to integrate a suppressor, enabling a streamlined, compact, suppressed configuration. This design ensures proper heat ventilation and stability. The SD handguard is ideal for stealth-oriented builds, offering an optimal balance of length, weight, and sound suppression capabilities.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_SigMcx8_Description: The SIG MCX 8-inch handguard is a compact, lightweight accessory designed for short-barreled MCX configurations. It enhances maneuverability, making it ideal for close-quarters engagements. The M-LOK attachment system allows for the mounting of accessories like grips, lights, and lasers without adding unnecessary weight.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_SvdPolymer_Description: The SVD/Tigr Polymer Handguard is an original replacement part designed for SVD rifles, including the civilian Tigr variant. Manufactured in Russia, this handguard is constructed from a durable black polymer, providing a sturdy and lightweight alternative to traditional wooden versions. Its design ensures a secure fit and reliable performance, maintaining the rifle's authenticity while enhancing its durability.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_SvdWooden_Description: The SVD Dragunov's wooden handguard is crafted from laminated hardwood, offering a classic aesthetic, enhanced durability, and heat resistance. It incorporates ventilation slots to facilitate cooling while maintaining the weapon's traditional appearance and ensuring a secure grip.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_FabVfrSvd_Description: The F.A.B. Defense VFR-SVD Handguard is a high-performance accessory designed to enhance the adaptability and effectiveness of SVD rifles. Made from premium-grade aluminum, this handguard replaces the original forearm, providing a sturdy and reliable foundation for mounting a variety of tactical accessories.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_Ak74Wooden_Description: A wooden handguard for the AK-74.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_AkmWooden_Description: A wooden handguard for the AKM.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_Aks74UWooden_Description: A wooden handguard for the AK-74U.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_Aks74UQuad_Description: An advanced polymer handguard for the AKS-74U, offering enhanced durability without adding excessive weight. It features four Picatinny rails for mounting various accessories.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_Aks74UMlok_Description: The M-LOK Handguard for the AKS-74U features a streamlined design with M-LOK slots on the sides and bottom, offering versatile accessory mounting options. It also includes a MIL-STD Picatinny rail on top for optics and other attachments.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_MagpulMoeAk_Description: The Magpul MOE AK Hand Guard is designed to replace the standard handguard retainer on AK pattern rifles that lack a front sling loop. The product has an extended gripping portion, an integrated heat shield, M-LOK mounting capability, and a replacement gas tube cover.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_MagpulMoeAkFDE_Description: The Magpul MOE AK Hand Guard is designed to replace the standard handguard retainer on AK pattern rifles that lack a front sling loop. The product has an extended gripping portion, an integrated heat shield, M-LOK mounting capability, and a replacement gas tube cover.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_Ak74Polymer_Description: The Russian AK-74 Polymer Handguard was designed as a direct handguard replacement for the standard AK-74 rifle. It is made of durable polymer, which provides better heat resistance and longevity. The handguard has an extended gripping surface and an integrated heat shield, which enhances the handling and performance of the AK-74.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_AkRomanianDong_Description: The AK handguard with reverse dong lower handguard is an authentic Romanian military component prized for its durability and authenticity. It is highly sought after by enthusiasts seeking to enhance or restore their firearms with genuine military surplus parts.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_AkRomanianShark_Description: The Romanian 'shark fin' handguard is a unique component found on certain variants of Romanian AK-pattern rifles. Its sleek and angular profile resembles the dorsal fin of a shark, hence the name. While enhancing the rifle's appearance, the shark fin handguard also upholds functionality and durability. This unique feature is highly coveted by enthusiasts seeking to customize or upgrade their AK rifles with authentic Romanian components.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_AkPolymerWithPicatinnyRail_Nam: AK Polymer Handguard with Picatinny Rail
KeysToEntries.Handguard_AkPolymerWithPicatinnyRail_Des: The MCS Polymer AK Lightweight Handguard Quad Rail system is designed to increase accessory compatibility for the AK platform. It is constructed from heat-resistant high-density polymer and includes built-in vents for effective heat dissipation. The handguard is durable and features a solid color polymer that prevents chipping. It has 11 slots on the top rail, 10 on the bottom, and single-slot removable side rails, all meeting Weaver/Picatinny specifications.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_B10B19Ak_Description: The B-10M handguard milled rail, made from D16T aluminum alloy, seamlessly replaces the standard handguard on a variety of AK platform carbines. Similarly, the B-19 upper handguard milled rail, also machined from D16T aluminum alloy, is designed to sit atop the gas tube on compatible handguards. This combination forms a Picatinny rail over the gas tube without obstructing the line of sight. Together, these handguards form Picatinny rails that provide versatility for attaching additional equipment to the firearm.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_B30B31SAk_Description: The B-30 handguard rail, machined from D16T coated aluminum alloy, seamlessly replaces the standard handguard on a variety of AK platform rifles. Now in its V2.0 generation, the B-31S upper handguard rail is also machined from D16T aluminum alloy and coated in black or desert color. Designed to attach to the B-30 or B-30U rails with eight screws, it forms a 170±5mm Picatinny rail above the upper handguard and barrel of the AK series, preserving the line of sight.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_AkRatnik_Description: The AK Ratnik series short handguard is designed for modern AK rifles and offers improved ergonomics and versatility. This handguard is typically constructed of high-quality, lightweight materials such as aluminum or polymer, ensuring durability and ease of handling. Its shorter length provides a compact and streamlined profile, making it suitable for close-quarters combat and operations requiring high mobility.
