KeysToEntries.Handguard_AkRatnikLong_Description: The AK Ratnik series long handguard enhances the standard AK rifle by offering extended space for mounting a range of tactical accessories. This long handguard improves rifle stability and control during prolonged use, while its increased length allows for better heat dissipation and provides ample surface area for attaching grips, bipods, and other essential gear.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_AkRatnik308_Description: An essential feature of the AK-308 rifle, this handguard is designed for improved ergonomics and tactical flexibility, allowing the user to mount various accessories such as optics, grips, and lights.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_ScorpionEvo3_Description: <DEV> 6.84-inch Handguard: A balanced, mid-length option providing more rail space for accessories while maintaining a streamlined look. Perfect for users wanting added versatility without compromising maneuverability.
KeysToEntries.Stock_RussianRecoilReducingPad_Descripti: The Rubber Shock Absorbing Recoil Pad is a deluxe-style pad designed with ergonomic features to reduce recoil. It has a smart slip-on sleeve design with lip reinforcement.
KeysToEntries.Stock_Ak47AkmWooden_Description: A wooden stock that is compatible with AK-47 and AKM rifles.
KeysToEntries.Stock_Ak74NWooden_Description: A typical wooden stock for the AK-47, AK-74M and AK-74N.
KeysToEntries.Stock_AkmsnFoldable_Description: A foldable AKMSN stock designed to be light and compact.
KeysToEntries.Stock_AkMagpulMoe_Description: The Magpul MOE AK Stock is a fixed stock designed for rifles with stamped receivers. It integrates Magpul's innovative design and construction into the AK platform. The MOE AK Stock features a unique wedge block fit inspired by the Zhukov-S Stock. It includes internal storage, strategically positioned QD sling swivels, and a rubber butt pad for effective recoil absorption and secure positioning.
KeysToEntries.Stock_AkMagpulMoeFDE_Description: The Magpul MOE AK Stock is a fixed stock designed for rifles with stamped receivers. It integrates Magpul's innovative design and construction into the AK platform. The MOE AK Stock features a unique wedge block fit inspired by the Zhukov-S Stock. It includes internal storage, strategically positioned QD sling swivels, and a rubber butt pad for effective recoil absorption and secure positioning.
KeysToEntries.Stock_Ak74MPolymer_Description: The AK-74M Polymer Stock is made of durable synthetic polymer and is compatible with AK-100, AK-105, AK-74M, Saiga, and Yunker rifles.
KeysToEntries.Stock_Aks74UFoldable_Description: The AKS-74U Side-Folding Triangle Stock is a rugged and practical upgrade for AK-series rifles. Made from high-quality steel, it features a classic triangle design that ensures both durability and stability.
KeysToEntries.Stock_AkRatnikFoldable_Description: This folding stock for the AK Ratnik series is a rugged and functional accessory designed to enhance the versatility of AK rifles. It features a 5.5-pin mechanism that ensures secure attachment and reliable performance.
KeysToEntries.Stock_ZhukovStockFDE_Description: Unlike traditional AK stocks, the Zhukov-S Stock is foldable and collapsible and features QD sling mounts, customizable cheek risers, and a shock-absorbing rubber butt pad for improved grip and comfort.
KeysToEntries.Stock_Aks74UM4Foldable_Description: The FAB Defense M4 Folding AKS-74U (Krinkov) Stock is a lightweight, durable stock made from reinforced fiberglass polymer. It features an M4-style tube compatible with various M4/M16 stocks and offers eight adjustable positions for an optimal fit. The folding mechanism enhances portability, and an optional recoil-reducing buffer is included to improve accuracy during rapid fire.
KeysToEntries.Stock_ZhukovStock_Description: Unlike traditional AK stocks, the Zhukov-S Stock is foldable and collapsible and features QD sling mounts, customizable cheek risers, and a shock-absorbing rubber butt pad for improved grip and comfort.
KeysToEntries.Stock_ZenitcoPt1_Description: The PT-1 telescopic skeleton stock is designed for the AK series of rifles and features a rubber butt pad and cheek. It is positioned in the standard location where AK stocks typically fold to the side, allowing for tailored adjustments to the shooter's tasks and individual physique.
KeysToEntries.Stock_ZenitcoPt3_Description: The telescopic PT-3 stock is designed for use with the AK series of rifles. It is milled and equipped with a rubber back and cheek pad. The stock is installed in the standard location where AK stocks typically fold to the side. It features a length adjustment mechanism with a range of 5 cm and a customizable cheek rest.
KeysToEntries.Stock_NorincoQCA1Buffertube_Description: A receiver extension for the Norinco CQ A1. It provides a secure mounting point for the stock and aids in mitigating recoil, resulting in enhanced shooting comfort and improved control. Similar to other Norinco CQ parts, it may exhibit differences in quality compared to its Western counterparts.
KeysToEntries.Stock_NorincoCQA1StandardButtStock_Descr: A standard Norinco CQ A1 buttstock.
KeysToEntries.Stock_CaaM401NylonStock_Description: Constructed from premium nylon, this stock features a comfortable rubber-covered butt plate and rugged construction for extended durability. Its sleek design not only enhances aesthetics but also provides a secure grip in combat scenarios. The stock features a sturdy nylon lever with a metal pin for exceptional strength, along with a built-in ring for convenient sling attachment.
KeysToEntries.Stock_ColtM4Buffertube_Description: A receiver extension compatible with the AR-15 platform. It provides a secure mounting point for the stock and aids in mitigating recoil, resulting in enhanced shooting comfort and improved control.
KeysToEntries.Stock_ColtM4BuffertubeFDE_Description: A receiver extension compatible with the AR-15 platform. It provides a secure mounting point for the stock and aids in mitigating recoil, resulting in enhanced shooting comfort and improved control.
KeysToEntries.Stock_ColtM4StandardButtStock_Descriptio: A standard Colt M4 buttstock compatible with the AR-15 weapon platform.
KeysToEntries.Stock_LmtSopmodStock_Description: A preferred stock among USSOCOM soldiers for the AR-15 weapon platform, offering enhanced comfort and optimal fit for the operator. This stock ensures durability, reliability, and improved weapon handling.
KeysToEntries.Stock_LmtSopmodStockFDE_Description: A preferred stock among USSOCOM soldiers for the AR-15 weapon platform, offering enhanced comfort and optimal fit for the operator. This stock ensures durability, reliability, and improved weapon handling.
KeysToEntries.Stock_Ar15ArchangelCheekRiser_Descriptio: Raises cheek weld 3/4 inch in height.
KeysToEntries.Stock_Ar15ArchangelLowProfile_Descriptio: The Low-profile design is lightweight and compact but still allows for quick weapon handling/accurate shooting. It includes over-molded quick detach sling swivel cup mounting points and slots for standard web slings. The stock is constructed using high-strength carbon fiber and glass-reinforced black polymer.
KeysToEntries.Stock_DanielDefenseAdjustable_Descriptio: The Daniel Defense adjustable buttstock is made of a unique blend of glass-infused polymers and finished with soft-touch rubber in strategic areas. It is precision-formed for Mil-Spec receiver extensions, minimizing forward or lateral play that is often found in other buttstocks. This eliminates the need for a tensioning device or friction lock.
KeysToEntries.Stock_DanielDefenseAdjustableBlack_Descr: The Daniel Defense adjustable buttstock is made of a unique blend of glass-infused polymers and finished with soft-touch rubber in strategic areas. It is precision-formed for Mil-Spec receiver extensions, minimizing forward or lateral play that is often found in other buttstocks. This eliminates the need for a tensioning device or friction lock.
KeysToEntries.Stock_ExtendedRubberButtPad_Description: The Extended Rubber Butt-Pad is crafted with a robust rubber material to provide improved grip on the shoulder and enhance impact/drop mitigation.
KeysToEntries.Stock_MagpulCtr_Description: An adjustable buttstock compatible with AR-15, M4, and M16 platforms that use MIL-SPEC buffer tubes. It features a friction-lock system to reduce wobble and a shielded release lever to prevent accidental collapse. The slim A-frame profile includes a rubber butt pad and an ambidextrous QD sling mount.
KeysToEntries.Stock_MagpulCtrFDE_Description: An adjustable buttstock compatible with AR-15, M4, and M16 platforms that use MIL-SPEC buffer tubes. It features a friction-lock system to reduce wobble and a shielded release lever to prevent accidental collapse. The slim A-frame profile includes a rubber butt pad and an ambidextrous QD sling mount.
KeysToEntries.Stock_MagpulMoe_Description: The MOE Carbine Stock - Mil-Spec model is a replacement buttstock for AR15/M16 carbines that use Mil-Spec-sized receiver extension tubes. Its streamlined A-frame profile is designed for light, fast action and avoids snagging. The release latch is also shielded to prevent accidental activation.
KeysToEntries.Stock_CzBren2StandardStockType1_Descript: <DEV> The genuine CZ folding stock for Bren 2 models delivers exceptional versatility with both folding and collapsible features. Compatible with 5.56x45 and 7.62x39 Bren 2 configurations, this stock enhances portability without sacrificing stability, providing a dynamic and compact solution for your firearm needs.
KeysToEntries.Stock_CzBren2StandardStockType2_Descript: <DEV> The genuine CZ folding stock for Bren 2 models delivers exceptional versatility with both folding and collapsible features. Compatible with 5.56x45 and 7.62x39 Bren 2 configurations, this stock enhances portability without sacrificing stability, providing a dynamic and compact solution for your firearm needs.
KeysToEntries.Stock_HkG36Stock_Description: <DEV> Effortlessly integrate the HK G36 folding stock into your CZ Bren 2. precision-machined aluminum stock adapter, paired with a high-performance polymer shell deflector, creates one of the most streamlined and comprehensive stock options for the Bren 2 platform. The purpose-built shell deflector ensures secure retention to the receiver when folded, offering a seamless and secure fit. With accessible safety selectors and trigger, the weapon can fire even while folded, adding to the adaptability and functionality of your Bren 2.
KeysToEntries.Stock_M700Wood_Description: Crafted from premium wood, this stock enhances the rifle's aesthetics and provides a comfortable, ergonomic grip.
KeysToEntries.Stock_M700HSPrecision2000_Description: The H-S Precision Pro-Series 2000 M24 A1 Tactical Stock is a precision-engineered upgrade for the Remington M700 rifle. It is designed for durability and accuracy, with a classic ergonomic design that offers good grip and maneuverability.
KeysToEntries.Stock_Rem700MagpulHunter_Description: The Hunter 700L Stock for the Remington M700 rifle is made with a reinforced polymer and an anodized aluminum bedding block. It offers complete adjustability in length of pull, comb height, and improved ergonomics.
KeysToEntries.Stock_Rem700MagpulHunterFDE_Description: The Hunter 700L Stock for the Remington M700 rifle is made with a reinforced polymer and an anodized aluminum bedding block. It offers complete adjustability in length of pull, comb height, and improved ergonomics.
KeysToEntries.Stock_M700ModX_Description: The A*B Arms MOD*X GEN III is a lightweight, ergonomically designed stock for the Remington M700, ideal for military, law enforcement, and hunting enthusiasts.
KeysToEntries.Stock_RemingtonM870ExpressWood_Descripti: This stock combines classic aesthetics with reliable performance. It is crafted with durable materials, offering a comfortable grip and a timeless look.
KeysToEntries.Stock_RemingtonM870HogueOdGreen_Descript: Made from durable rubber, this stock provides a comfortable and secure grip, improving control with each shot and ensuring reliable performance for extended use.
KeysToEntries.Stock_RemingtonM870MagpulSga_Description: The SGA Stock is a versatile buttstock, offering customizable options to enhance the Remington 870 12 gauge shotgun. The stock is equipped with a spacer system for adjusting the length of pull, enhanced grip ergonomics, a recoil-reducing butt-pad, and the choice of optional cheek risers for compatibility with optics or raised sights.
KeysToEntries.Stock_RemingtonM870MagpulSgaFDE_Descript: The SGA Stock is a versatile buttstock, offering customizable options to enhance the Remington 870 12 gauge shotgun. The stock is equipped with a spacer system for adjusting the length of pull, enhanced grip ergonomics, a recoil-reducing butt-pad, and the choice of optional cheek risers for compatibility with optics or raised sights.
KeysToEntries.Stock_McxMpxFoldingVisor_Description: The SIG Sauer factory replacement folding visor stock for MCX/MPX rifles is engineered for seamless integration with the receiver's 1913 interface, ensuring a quick and easy installation process. It combines durability with functionality, offering a secure and comfortable shooting platform for the MCX/MPX series, ideal for both tactical and recreational use.
KeysToEntries.Stock_McxMpxFolding_Description: The SIG Sauer factory replacement skeletonized folding stock for MCX/MPX rifles is meticulously crafted from premium materials and designed to reduce weight while maintaining strength, providing enhanced maneuverability and support during dynamic, fast-paced operations.
KeysToEntries.Stock_McxMpxMinimalistFolding_Descriptio: The SIG Sauer factory replacement minimalist folding visor stock for MCX/MPX rifles is engineered for seamless integration with the receiver's 1913 interface, ensuring a straightforward installation process. It offers a lightweight, compact design, reducing overall rifle weight while maintaining strength and providing enhanced mobility without compromising stability.
KeysToEntries.Stock_McxMpxStandart_Description: The SIG Sauer factory replacement standard folding visor stock for MCX/MPX rifles is engineered for seamless integration with the receiver's 1913 interface, ensuring a straightforward installation process. The stock features a robust, durable design that enhances overall rifle stability and offers a secure, comfortable shooting experience, even in demanding conditions.
KeysToEntries.Stock_McxMpxTelescoping_Description: The SIG Sauer factory replacement telescoping stock for MCX/MPX rifles is engineered for seamless integration with the receiver's 1913 interface, ensuring a straightforward installation process. Its adjustable length allows for a customized fit, providing improved comfort and control during use.
KeysToEntries.Stock_Mp7A1Retractable_Description: The H&K MP7A1 3-Position Retractable Stock is a high-quality, factory-original component designed for the Heckler & Koch MP7. It features a three-position adjustment system, allowing users to customize the length for optimal comfort and control. Constructed from lightweight yet durable materials, it ensures stability while preserving the MP7's compact design.
KeysToEntries.Stock_Mp7A2Retractable_Description: The H&K MP7A2 3-Position Retractable Stock is a high-quality, factory-original component designed for the Heckler & Koch MP7. It features a three-position adjustment system, allowing users to customize the length for optimal comfort and control. Constructed from lightweight yet durable materials, it ensures stability while preserving the MP7's compact design.
KeysToEntries.Stock_SvdPolymerStockwithGrip_Descriptio: The SVD Polymer Stock is a modern replacement for the traditional wooden stock of the Dragunov SVD sniper rifle. Constructed from durable polymer, it offers improved weather resistance, reduced weight, and enhanced durability, making it ideal for tactical applications.
KeysToEntries.Stock_SvdWoodenStockwithGrip_Description: The SVD Wooden Stock is the classic buttstock of the Dragunov SVD sniper rifle, known for its distinctive design and historical authenticity. Crafted from premium hardwood, it offers durability, a timeless aesthetic, and the rugged construction that has defined the SVD since its inception.
KeysToEntries.Stock_MosinCarbineWooden_Description: The Mosin Carbine Wooden Stock is a classic accessory for the Mosin-Nagant rifle, which has been used in various military conflicts throughout history. It is crafted from durable wood, enhancing the rifle's aesthetics and providing a comfortable grip.
KeysToEntries.Stock_MosinFolding_Description: This folding stock allows for improved portability and ease of transportation. It is made of naturally dried wood and solid steel components, giving it an old-school look.
KeysToEntries.Stock_MosinRifleWooden_Description: This durable wood stock enhances the firearm's aesthetics and provides a solid, comfortable grip for the shooter. It is known for its historical significance and rugged build.
KeysToEntries.Stock_MosinSniperRifleWooden_Description: This durable wood stock enhances the firearm's aesthetics and provides a solid, comfortable grip for the shooter. It is known for its historical significance and rugged build. The sniper version features slight changes, such as a cheek rest and a longer length of pull, compared to the classic version.
KeysToEntries.Stock_MosinProMagArchangel_Description: Engineered to enhance the performance of Mosin-Nagant rifles with its modern and durable design. It is made from rugged polymer material in an olive drab color, and offers a tactical and functional upgrade. The adjustable cheek rest and length of pull provide personalized comfort, while the overall design includes ergonomic enhancements for improved handling.
KeysToEntries.Stock_MosinKpykCrookChassis_Description: An aluminum 7075 main chassis with an M-LOK handguard. It fits AR-style pistol grips and attaches to standard AR stock threads. It includes two Picatinny rails with M-LOK points.
KeysToEntries.Stock_MossbergSyntheticStock_Description: The Synthetic Shotgun Stock is a durable and lightweight option for upgrading or replacing existing stocks on your 12 gauge shotgun.
KeysToEntries.Stock_MagpulSgaMossbergStock_Description: The SGA Stock is a versatile buttstock designed for Mossberg 500/590/590A1 12-gauge shotguns. It offers enhanced adjustability and ergonomics, with an ambidextrous design that allows for easy customization to suit individual preferences.
KeysToEntries.Stock_M1AProMagArchangelStock_Descriptio: A reinforced polymer chassis featuring an adjustable cheek riser and length of pull for a tailored fit. Equipped with an ergonomic pistol grip with internal storage, a textured forend with an integrated Picatinny rail, and multiple sling points, it offers improved control and consistent accuracy across varied conditions.
KeysToEntries.Stock_M1AStockWalnutSainedHardWood_Descr: This hardwood stock, finished in a rich walnut stain, delivers a traditional look with solid, durable construction. Designed for a stable shoulder fit and comfortable handling, it preserves the traditional feel of the M1A while maintaining reliability in the field.
KeysToEntries.Stock_M1ASocomCqbStock_Description: A durable composite chassis featuring a 5-position collapsible buttstock for adjustable length of pull, an integrated pistol grip for secure handling, and M-LOK slots along the forend for mounting lights, grips, or lasers. Dual QD sling sockets at the front and rear allow for flexible carry configurations. Ideal for transforming the M1A into a more compact and mission-adaptable platform for both close-quarters and extended field use.
KeysToEntries.Stock_Vz61Wire_Description: A folding stock crafted for the Vz. 61 Skorpion submachine gun. Constructed from durable steel wire, it offers easy storage and deployment. Despite its lightweight design, the stock ensures stability and control during shooting.
KeysToEntries.Stock_Mp5A3Stock_Description: The retractable design of this MP5 stock by Heckler & Koch allows for adjustable length-of-pull, providing versatility, while its durable construction ensures reliability in the field.
KeysToEntries.Stock_Mp5A2Stock_Description: This high-quality MP5 stock, made in the USA, features a rubberized backplate that reduces felt recoil and wear on the carrier, thus enhancing comfort and durability for a smoother shooting experience.
KeysToEntries.Stock_SpuhrMp5Hk3353Stock_Description: This MP5 stock adapter, machined from solid billet aircraft aluminum, features an integral buffer and six-position length adjustment. It includes a non-reciprocating cheekpiece with additional height options, aligning the shooter's eye with optic sights.
KeysToEntries.Stock_SksWood_Description: The SKS wooden stock is a hallmark feature of the Soviet-designed Simonov semi-automatic rifle. Crafted from durable hardwood, it ensures a stable and comfortable grip for the shooter. Its traditional design not only offers an aesthetic appeal but also withstands diverse environmental conditions. Typically boasting a smooth finish, it enhances both appearance and functionality, rendering it a favored option among firearms enthusiasts for its enduring charm and dependable performance.
KeysToEntries.Stock_SksMatadorArmsSabertoothMkII_Descr: The SABERTOOTH MK-II boasts a robust, aircraft-grade aluminum build, meticulously machined for straightforward installation across a wide range of SKS variants. Its design promotes versatility, allowing users to personalize their rifles with standard AR-15 pistol grips and buttstocks. Equipped with a sturdy aluminum quad rail handguard, it provides limitless possibilities for accessory mounting. Compatible with diverse SKS models and magazine types, it incorporates a removable dust cap block for effortless maintenance. Additionally, the design incorporates a rear recess to accommodate an optional top-rail mount.
KeysToEntries.Stock_AtiSksStrikeforceTactLite_Descript: The TactLite Adjustable Stock stands out as one of the lightest six-position adjustable stocks available. Beyond its lightweight design, this innovative stock prioritizes functionality by reducing snag points and providing a secure fit. Crafted from durable DuPont Extreme Temperature Glass Reinforced Polymer, it ensures resilience in diverse environmental conditions.
KeysToEntries.Stock_ScorpionEvo3FoldingStock_Descripti: <DEV> The CZ Scorpion Evo folding stock is a high-quality, original CZ accessory designed for compatibility with all CZ Scorpion Evo and Scorpion 3+ models. It features a durable polymer body with a duralumin joint, measuring 27.5 cm in length, and is easy to install by replacing the current stock. Available in black, it provides a sturdy, foldable option for compact storage and maneuverability
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_Cz75BStandardGrips_Descriptio: <DEV> Rubber grips designed for CZ 75 Compact and CZ 75 P-01 Omega pistols, these ergonomic accessories enhance handling and provide a secure, firm grip even in challenging conditions. Made to ensure comfort and reliability, they are an excellent upgrade for users seeking improved control and durability in their firearm's performance.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_Cz75B_Description: <DEV> The CZ 75 B is part of the CZ 75 series, known for its high-capacity magazines, superior ergonomics, and reliable performance. Its all-steel construction contributes to its durability and balance, making it a preferred choice for personal defense, sport shooting, and service use
KeysToEntries.Barrel_Colt1911Comander_45Acp_Descriptio: The Colt 1911 Commander 4.25" Stainless Barrel is engineered for .45 ACP. Precision-machined from robust stainless steel, this factory-original barrel ensures optimal performance and durability for the Colt 1911 Commander.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_ScorpionEvo3S1_Description: <DEV> The Scorpion EVO 3 S1 is a civilian version of the EVO 3, designed to comply with legal restrictions in various countries. The EVO 3 S1 retains the same high-quality build, reliability, and modularity of the EVO 3 but is tailored for civilian sport shooting and self-defense, maintaining the submachine gun’s style in a compliant format.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_Colt1911Commander_Description: Introduced in 1949, the Colt Commander was developed as a lightweight, compact alternative to the full-size Colt 1911. It was created in response to a U.S. military request for a smaller, more portable sidearm after World War II. The original model featured an aluminum alloy frame, making it lighter than the traditional steel-framed 1911.
KeysToEntries.Receiver_ScorpionEvo3S1_Description: <DEV> The receiver on the Scorpion EVO 3 S1 retains the same polymer construction as the EVO 3 but is adapted for civilian use. The semi-automatic S1 model’s receiver design is identical in terms of durability, ambidextrous controls, and accessory compatibility, but it features additional compliance with civilian regulations. The S1 often comes with a Picatinny rail system, which supports custom configurations for optics and other add-ons while retaining the lightweight and reliable characteristics of the EVO series.
KeysToEntries.Slide_Colt1911ComanderSlide_Description: The Fusion Firearms 1911 Commander Carry Slide is a precision CNC-machined component designed for 1911-style pistols. It is crafted from durable 4140 bar-stock steel and heat-treated for enhanced strength, featuring robust combat-style rear serrations and standard dovetail cuts for both front and rear sights, accommodating a variety of sight options.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_ScorpionEvo316inch_9x19_Descripti: <DEV>Aimed at users looking for carbine-level accuracy and control, the 16-inch barrel is optimized for extended range and stability. It transforms the Scorpion EVO 3 into a more capable long-range 9mm platform while retaining its lightweight build.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_Colt1911Midas_Description:
The Colt 1911 is a renowned semi-automatic pistol designed by John Browning and first adopted by the U.S. military in 1911. It is chambered in .45 ACP and is known for its robust design, reliability, and stopping power. The Colt 1911 features a single-action trigger, a 7-round magazine, and a steel frame. It has been a popular choice for military, law enforcement, and civilian use due to its enduring performance and iconic status.

This Colt 1911 belongs to Songkram “Golden Boy” Manivanh, the leader of the Pha Lang criminal gang. Obsessed with gold and ostentatious displays of wealth, Songkram could not pass up the opportunity to make sure his weapon stood out among those of the other gang members. The grip is made of pearl, and the entire firearm shines with a golden luster.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_Type51Hammerhead_Description:
The Type 51 Tokarev is based on a steel-framed construction, which ensures durability and longevity. It uses a single-stack magazine that can hold eight rounds of 7.62x25mm Tokarev ammunition. The pistol operates on a simple blowback mechanism, which is known for its reliability and ease of maintenance.

This Type 51 Tokarev belongs to Sabtu "Naga" bin Panjang, the leader of the armed group occupying Ban Pa. Sabtu acquired this beautiful pistol from the captain of a cargo ship that he and his crew recently attacked. After killing the man with his own gun, Sabtu kept it simply because he liked its design.
KeysToEntries.Slide_Colt1911SlideMidas_Description:
The 1911 Government Rail Slide is a precision-engineered component for the Colt 1911 pistol. It enhances durability and performance through high-quality machining, providing an excellent fit and finish.

This is a part of the Colt 1911 belonging to Songkram "Golden Boy" Manivanh, the leader of the Pha Lang criminal gang.
KeysToEntries.Slide_Type51SlideHammerhead_Description:
The Type 51 Tokarev slide, originating from China, is made of steel, making it durable and resilient. The serrations at the rear offer enhanced grip during manipulation, and the slide itself houses the barrel and recoil spring assembly, facilitating the cycling of the pistol's action. Its robust construction and straightforward design ensure reliable functionality and ease of operation.

This is a part of the Type 51 Tokarev belonging to Sabtu "Naga" bin Panjang, leader of the armed group occupying Ban Pa.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_Colt1911_45AcpMidas_Description:
Made from 416R-certified stainless steel, this barrel is CNC-machined with precise fit points on the back of the receiver and the bottom of the feet, allowing for accurate lock-up and improved performance with simple hand-file fitting.

This is a part of the Colt 1911 belonging to Songkram "Golden Boy" Manivanh, the leader of the Pha Lang criminal gang.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_Colt1911Comander_45AcpThreaded_De: The Nighthawk Custom Match Grade Stainless Commander .45 ACP Threaded Barrel represents a significant enhancement for 1911 pistols. Fabricated from 416 stainless steel, the barrel boasts a commander-length profile of 5 inches and is equipped with threads, facilitating the attachment of a suppressor.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_ScorpionEvo3MagpulMoeGrip_Nam: <DEV> CZ Scorpion EVO 3 Magpul MOE Grip
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_ScorpionEvo3MagpulMoeGrip_Des: <DEV> The Magpul MOE-EVO Grip for the CZ Scorpion, available through HB Industries, is a high-strength polymer replacement grip that offers a steeper vertical angle for improved ergonomics. This design allows users to adopt a more compact stance
KeysToEntries.StockAdapter_Evo3HbIndustries_Name: <DEV> CZ Scorpion EVO 3 Stock Adapter Ar-15
KeysToEntries.StockAdapter_Evo3HbIndustries_Descriptio: <DEV> The CZ Scorpion Evo 3 AR-15 Stock Adapter by Ascalon Arms enables AR-15 type stock attachment to CZ Scorpion Evo and 3+ models. Made of durable 7075 duralumin with a hard elox finish, it provides a secure fit with minimal clearance to improve stability
KeysToEntries.StockAdapter_Evo3AR15_Name: <DEV> CZ Scorpion Evo 3 Stock Adapter Picatinny
KeysToEntries.StockAdapter_Evo3AR15_Description: <DEV> The HB Industries adapter for the CZ Scorpion EVO 3 enables attachment of any stock with a 1913/Picatinny interface, featuring a low-profile design and a QD sling mount. It is crafted from durable 6061 aluminum with a MIL-spec anodized finish, providing a robust solution for Scorpion EVO 3 users.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_CzBren2138MLok_Description: <DEV> The HBI 13.8″ handguard for the Bren 2 MS fits 14″ barrel models in 556/223 and 7.62×39 calibers. It offers over 3x the support hand area and over 7x the M-Lok positions compared to the factory handguard. It features a full-length continuous 1913/picatinny top rail for easy mounting of IR sight systems and peripheral switches. The design includes a gas block window for access to gas system adjustments without removing the handguard. It has a two-piece design for easy disassembly and cleaning of the gas system. Each handguard includes an integrated QD mounting plate system for sling integration on either side.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_SigMcx16_Description: The 16-inch SIG MCX Handguard has been engineered for full-length rifle configurations, offering extended modularity for accessory mounting. It provides maximum stability and heat dissipation, rendering it ideal for precision shooting and long-range applications. The M-LOK system ensures compatibility with various attachments while maintaining a lightweight yet durable profile.
KeysToEntries.Mag_Colt1911ProMag_15Rnd_45Acp_L3_Descri: ProMag's 15-round magazine for full-sized Colt 1911s is constructed of rugged, heat-treated steel and uses a chrome-silicon wire-wound follower spring that maintains tension over time.
KeysToEntries.Mag_BerettaM9A1_30Rnd_9x19_Description: This 30-round 9mm magazine offers extended capacity and is compatible with Beretta 92FS pistols and CX4 carbines. Built from durable materials for reliable feeding and performance, it’s a practical choice for sustained use.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_BerettaM9A1Rubber_Description: The Beretta Series Rubber Grip—WrapAround (Hogue) has been engineered to improve the handling and comfort of Beretta series pistols. Crafted from durable rubber, this wraparound grip provides a secure and ergonomic hold for improved control during shooting.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_BerettaM9A1Wood_Description: The Beretta Wood Grip is meticulously crafted from authentic walnut. It features refined oval checkering embellished with the Beretta trident logo. Designed as a direct replacement for FS model pistols, it enhances both the firearm's aesthetic appeal and handling.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_SagSvdMLokChassisMk1_Descripti: Designed to enhance the Dragunov SVD’s ergonomics and precision, the MK1 chassis is crafted from durable aluminum, providing improved modularity and enabling easier customization with modern accessories. It ensures consistent accuracy and improved handling, making it an ideal choice for both tactical and precision shooting.
KeysToEntries.Auxiliary_Colt1911CommanderHammer_Descri: The Colt Commander hammer is characterized by its rounded, shortened hammer design, which is intended to minimize hammer bite and enhance handling.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_F1FirearmsC7M14_Description: The F-1 Firearms C7M AR-15 Contoured M-LOK Handguard is a free-floating handguard designed for AR-15 rifles. Its contoured grip area improves comfort and control, and its enlarged inside diameter fits most major suppressors. The handguard has a scalloped top Picatinny rail and M-LOK slots on the sides and bottom, enabling versatile accessory mounting.
KeysToEntries.Mag_M201c_8Rnd_9x19_Description: A dependable steel magazine designed for the M-201C pistol chambered in 9x19mm. With an eight-round capacity, it strikes a balance between lightweight portability and reliable feeding performance.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_NorincoJw87Wooden_Description: <DEV> This wooden handguard is made of hardwood and offers a comfortable grip while protecting the shooter's hand from the heat of the barrel during firing.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_M16A1_Description: A triangular polymer handguard with integrated heat shields for effective barrel insulation and user protection. Its classic M16A1 design ensures a solid grip while delivering period-correct aesthetics, making it ideal for vintage restorations or Vietnam-era clone builds.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_M201C_Description: The Norinco M201-C is a 9mm semi-automatic pistol inspired by the Soviet Tokarev TT-33. Produced by China's Norinco, it modernizes the original with a manual safety, ergonomic grip, and chambering for contemporary 9×19mm ammunition, making it compatible with widely available modern ammo.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_M16A1_Description: The M16A1 is a 5.56×45mm NATO, gas-operated, magazine-fed rifle adopted by the U.S. military during the Vietnam War. It utilizes a direct-impingement gas system and features select-fire capability, allowing for both semi-automatic and fully automatic fire. Improvements over the original M16 included a chrome-lined barrel, birdcage flash hider, and a forward assist to enhance reliability in harsh conditions. The M16A1 became the standard-issue rifle for U.S. forces from the late 1960s through the 1970s.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_NorincoJw87_Description: The Norinco JW-87 is a single-shot, break-action shotgun manufactured in China by Norinco. Designed with simplicity and reliability in mind, it’s primarily intended for hunting but is still suitable for a wide range of practical uses.
KeysToEntries.Stock_M16A1_Description: This fixed polymer stock features a slim, lightweight profile and a trapdoor storage compartment for a cleaning kit or small tools. Designed for M16A1 and AR-15 rifles, it provides a stable cheek weld and classic handling characteristics. Its rugged construction ensures dependable performance in the field with a no-nonsense, practical design.
KeysToEntries.Stock_M16Buffertube_Description: A precision-engineered mil‑spec buffer tube built for AR-15, M4, and M16 platforms. Constructed from heat-treated 7075-T6 aluminum, it offers exceptional strength and durability, ensuring consistent performance under sustained use.
KeysToEntries.Stock_NorincoJw87Wooden_Description: <DEV> This wooden stock is crafted from hardwood and features a recoil pad that helps to absorb shock.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_M201c46inch_9x19_Description: Built for the M-201C platform, this 4.6-inch barrel offers reliable performance in a compact design.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_NorincoJw8728inch_12Gaug_Descript: <DEV> Suitable for both hunting and self-defense, this 28” barrel features a full choke for improved shot control across various scenarios.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_M14_Description: The M14 is a 7.62×51mm NATO, gas-operated, magazine-fed battle rifle developed in the United States and adopted in 1959. It features a rotating bolt and selective-fire capability, though most rifles were issued in semi-automatic only. With a 20-round detachable box magazine, the M14 gained a reputation for reliability and long-range effectiveness. It saw extensive use during the early stages of the Vietnam War and remains in limited service today, particularly as a designated marksman rifle.
KeysToEntries.Stock_M1AProMagArchangelStockOlive_Name: M1A Pro Mag Archangel Stock (Olive Drab)
KeysToEntries.Stock_M1AProMagArchangelStockOlive_Descr: A reinforced polymer chassis featuring an adjustable cheek riser and length of pull for a tailored fit. Equipped with an ergonomic pistol grip with internal storage, a textured forend with an integrated Picatinny rail, and multiple sling points, it offers improved control and consistent accuracy across varied conditions.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_M1ASolidComposite_Description: This lightweight composite handguard is crafted from reinforced polymer for excellent heat resistance and durability. Designed for the M1A/M14, it installs easily and maintains proper barrel clearance to preserve accuracy under sustained fire.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_M1AScoutComposite_Description: This black polymer handguard is specifically designed for the Springfield M1A Scout. Its durable, heat-resistant construction ensures consistent performance and a secure fit under demanding conditions.
KeysToEntries.Mag_Mp7_40Rnd_46x30CAMO_Description: The MP7's 40-round magazine maximizes ammunition capacity, extending the duration of sustained fire in situations that require it. However, this increase in capacity comes with a slight increase in weight and size.
KeysToEntries.Mag_Ar15AtiSchmeisserS60_60Rnd_556x45CAM: The S60 ATI Schmeisser magazine has a stunning ammo capacity of 60 rounds, making it useful for full-auto fire and long combat scenarios. It can be chambered with 5.56x45mm or .300 AAC Blackout rounds, and is compatible with AR-style firearms.

The S60 ATI Schmeisser magazine has a stunning ammo capacity of 60 rounds, making it useful for full-auto fire and long combat scenarios. It can be chambered with 5.56x45mm or .300 AAC Blackout rounds, and is compatible with AR-style firearms.
KeysToEntries.Mag_PmagAkm_30Rnd_762x39CAMO_Description: The PMAG 30 AK/AKM MOE is a lightweight and reliable 30-round polymer magazine designed for 7.62x39mm Kalashnikov-pattern rifles, such as the AK-47, AKM, AKS, SIG556R, and similar models. It features a detachable floorplate, consistent curve design, stainless steel spring, and a high-reliability, low-friction follower. The magazine is cost-effective and delivers the reliable performance associated with MOE PMAGs.
KeysToEntries.Mag_Ak308_20Rnd_762x51CAMO_Description: The new AK-308 20-round magazine designed for 7.62x51 mm rifles. Developed by izhmash, it adheres to strict military standards. This magazine features a robust stamped steel AK-308 angled baseplate and a unique double detent mag insert for secure locking. Constructed from lightweight, impact-resistant polymer, it ensures durability in various temperatures.
KeysToEntries.Mag_MossbergNordicMagazineExt_10Rnd_12Ga: The Nordic Magazine Extension is designed for Mossberg shotguns and has a capacity of 10 rounds. It allows users to carry more rounds for their firearm.
KeysToEntries.Mag_Remington700Aics_10Rnd_762x51Camo_De: The Single Stack Accuracy International Magazine is both durable and corrosion-resistant. It is constructed from steel and features special coatings, while the removable springs and followers make cleaning simple. It can hold ten rounds.
KeysToEntries.Mag_SvdDragunov_20Rnd_762x54CAMO_Descrip: This high-capacity steel magazine is designed for extended engagements with the SVD Dragunov, offering increased firepower. With a 20-round capacity for 7.62×54mmR, it ensures durability and reliability while enhancing the rifle's sustained fire capability.
KeysToEntries.Slide_M201cSlide_Description: A steel slide assembly for the M-201C 9×19 mm pistol. It includes front and rear serrations for improved manipulation and houses the barrel bushing, recoil spring plug, and striker components. It is designed for use with the standard M-201C barrel and recoil assembly.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_M201cGrips_Description: A black polymer pistol grip for the M-201C pistol.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_SigMcx675inch_300ACCAMO_Descripti: The 6.75-inch barrel for the SIG MCX, chambered in .300 Blackout, is engineered for ultra-compact configurations, making it ideal for close-quarters scenarios and personal defense. Despite its shorter length, it delivers reliable performance and is optimized for subsonic ammunition, making it perfect for suppressed shooting.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_Svd620mm_762x54CAMO_Description: The SVD 620mm barrel is a chrome-lined, hammer-forged component designed for exceptional durability and accuracy. Chambered for 7.62×54mmR, it optimizes velocity and effective range. The 24.4-inch (620mm) length strikes a balance between precision and maneuverability, making it ideal for designated marksman roles. Additionally, the barrel is equipped with a distinctive flash suppressor.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_Ar1520inch_556x45CAMO_Description: This AR-15 barrel boasts a length of 508mm and is specifically crafted for the AR-15 weapon platform. It offers compatibility with various 5.56x45mm cartridges, providing increased accuracy for your firearm.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_M70026inchHeavy_762x51Camo_Descri: This 26” barrel is designed for the Remington 700 series rifles and offers easy installation. It has a tapered profile, making it ideal for target shooting. Crafted from high-quality Chromoly steel alloys, each barrel undergoes a meticulous one-at-a-time process to ensure superb accuracy.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_Mossberg50020inch_12GaugCAMO_Desc: The 20" all-purpose barrel with vent rib is compatible with 12 gauge Mossberg 500 series and Maverick 88 6-shot models. It has a bead sight for quick target acquisition, making it suitable for various shooting scenarios. The smoothbore and matte-blued finish provide reliability and durability.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_M700Camo_Description:
The Remington M700 is an accurate and reliable bolt-action rifle widely used by hunters, law enforcement agencies, and military snipers around the world. With a reputation for precision, the M700 is available in various calibers and configurations to suit different shooting applications, from long-range target shooting to big game hunting.

This Remington M700 belongs to Bane “Yen” Seeha, the military commander of Midnight Sapphire. Bane is a professional who follows orders and asks no questions. This attitude has earned him a stellar career in the LAF. He does not care for ostentatious adornment and has instead chosen a functional camouflage pattern that suits his work. For him, that is more than enough.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_SaVz58Polymer_Description: This is the original Czech polymer handguard for the Sa vz. 58 rifle, produced by Czech Small Arms. Modeled after the classic wooden design, it is made from lightweight, heat-resistant polymer for enhanced durability. Subtle vertical texturing along the lower grip ensures secure handling, even under stress or with gloves. Its low weight reduces front-end load for improved maneuverability and installs easily without the need for a gunsmith. Ideal for upgrading to a lighter, cooler-running, and more practical setup while maintaining the authentic Sa vz. 58 look.
KeysToEntries.Mag_SaVz58_30Rnd_762x39_Description: This high-capacity steel magazine is designed for the Sa vz. 58 rifle chambered in 7.62×39 mm. Precision-stamped and heat-treated, this rugged 30-round magazine ensures reliable feeding even in the most demanding conditions. Its ergonomic design allows for quick, secure reloads while maintaining the rifle’s balance, making it an ideal choice for extended engagements in tactical or field environments.
KeysToEntries.Receiver_SaVz58DustCover_Description: A stamped steel receiver cover designed for the Sa vz. 58 rifles. It encloses the upper portion of the action and secures the bolt carrier and recoil spring assembly in place.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_SaVz58390mm_762x39_Description: A precision-engineered 390mm cold-hammer-forged barrel for the Sa vz. 58 rifle. Made from high-grade barrel steel, it offers excellent accuracy, heat resistance, and long-term durability under sustained fire. Chambered in 7.62×39mm with a standard twist rate, it preserves the rifle’s factory ballistics while maintaining its classic balance and handling.
KeysToEntries.Stock_SaVz58Folding_Description: A steel folding stock hinge for the Sa vz. 58 rifles. It folds to the right and locks securely when installed using the factory hinge pin. This durable, military-grade component is compatible with all Sa vz. 58-pattern receivers.
KeysToEntries.Stock_SaVz58Wooden_Description: A classic fixed buttstock for the Sa vz. 58 rifles. Early production models are crafted from solid hardwood, while later versions use a resin-impregnated wood composite (“beaver barf”).
KeysToEntries.Stock_SaVz58Polymer_Description: This lightweight, durable polymer stock is designed for the Sa vz. 58 rifle, combining classic styling with modern reliability. Its sleek black finish offers a clean, understated look, and it installs easily using the original receiver screw mount. The stock provides solid, stable shoulder support, ideal for consistent and precise shooting.
KeysToEntries.StockAdapter_SaVz58AR15_Name: Sa vz. 58 Buffer Tube Stock Adapter
KeysToEntries.StockAdapter_SaVz58AR15_Description: An aluminum folding stock adapter for the Sa vz. 58 rifles. It features a CNC-machined hinge for precision and includes an anodized buffer tube mount, along with a hinge spring and screw. The adapter enables side-folding stock installation while preserving full bolt functionality.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_SaVz58Wood_Description: An original wood pistol grip for the Sa vz. 58 rifles. Early (pre-1961) models are machined from solid hardwood, while later versions use a resin-impregnated wood composite (“beaver barf”). It attaches to the receiver with the standard Sa vz. 58 grip screw and offers a durable, stylish upgrade.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_SaVz58_Description: The Sa vz. 58 (7,62mm samopal vzor 58) is a 7.62×39mm assault rifle developed in Czechoslovakia in the late 1950s. Despite its visual similarity to the Soviet AK-47, the vz. 58 is a completely independent design, sharing no interchangeable parts with the Kalashnikov. It uses a short-stroke gas piston system, a milled steel receiver, and a distinctive linear hammer-fired mechanism with a hinged bolt locking piece. Compared to the AK-47, it is lighter and features a bolt hold-open device that engages after the final round is fired.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_SaVz58Wooden_Description: This is an original Czechoslovak wooden handguard for the Sa vz. 58 assault rifle. Made from durable hardwood, it features classic vented slots for heat dissipation, providing a lightweight and ergonomic grip while protecting the hands from the heat of the barrel. Its distinctive reddish finish gives the rifle a recognizable Cold War-era appearance, making it ideal for preserving authenticity or restoring surplus rifles to service-ready condition.
KeysToEntries.Receiver_L403A1UpperReceiver_Description: An upper receiver for the L403A1/KS-1 rifle, built on the AR platform. It’s machined from aluminum alloy and features a full-length Picatinny rail for optics along with M-LOK slots for accessory mounting. The design includes ambidextrous control cutouts and is intended to pair with its matching lower receiver, ensuring reliable performance in modern military applications.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_L403A1_Description: The L403A1 is a 5.56×45mm NATO, gas-operated, magazine-fed rifle adopted by the British Armed Forces through the Alternative Individual Weapon Program. Built by Knight's Armament Company, it is based on the AR-15 platform and features a free-floating barrel for enhanced accuracy, fully ambidextrous controls, and an M-LOK handguard for attaching accessories. Intended to replace the L85A3 in frontline service, the L403A1 is optimized for optical sights and modern soldier systems, ensuring full compatibility with current infantry gear.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_KacUrx6115_Description: A free-floating aluminum handguard designed for AR-15/SR-15 platforms. Its one-piece construction slides over the barrel and locks into place using integrated tabs and a proprietary barrel nut system. The handguard features full-length M-LOK slots along the sides and bottom, paired with a continuous Picatinny rail across the top.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_L403A1137nch_556x45_Description: This cold-hammer-forged, chrome-lined steel barrel is chambered in 5.56×45 mm NATO with a 1:7" twist rate. Measuring 13.7 inches, it features a heavy profile with dimple cuts that reduce weight and improve heat dissipation. Designed for mid-length gas systems, it pairs seamlessly with free-float handguards such as the URX-6.
KeysToEntries.Handle_AmbidextrousSr15_Description: This aluminum ambidextrous charging handle is designed for AR-15/SR-15 platforms. It features medium-sized latch pads on both sides that enable pinch-grip, index-hook, or knife-hand operation while reducing the risk of snagging.
KeysToEntries.Handle_AntregAr15PL_Description: The ANTREG AR-15 Charging Handle is manufactured in the Czech Republic and designed to fit the AR-15 platform firearms. The lever is ambidextrous and features stainless steel springs and reinforced hardened steel pins at the pivot points.
KeysToEntries.Handle_SigMcxGN_Description: The SIG MCX Charging Handle is an ambidextrous component designed for the SIG MCX rifle platform. It allows users to manually cycle the firearm’s action, chamber rounds, and clear malfunctions efficiently from either side, accommodating both left- and right-handed shooters. Constructed from durable materials, this charging handle ensures reliable performance in various conditions.
KeysToEntries.Stock_Mp7A2RetractableSC_Description: The H&K MP7A2 3-Position Retractable Stock is a high-quality, factory-original component designed for the Heckler & Koch MP7. It features a three-position adjustment system, allowing users to customize the length for optimal comfort and control. Constructed from lightweight yet durable materials, it ensures stability while preserving the MP7's compact design.
KeysToEntries.Stock_KacBuffertube_Description: A precision-engineered, durable component built for reliable performance on AR-15/M16 platforms. It provides smooth stock adjustment and a solid lock-up for consistent shooting stability. Ideal for converting fixed-stock rifles into modern carbine configurations or finishing custom builds, it offers dependable function and full compatibility with mil-spec accessories.
KeysToEntries.Mag_Ar15AtiSchmeisserS60_60Rnd_556x45GN_: The S60 ATI Schmeisser magazine has a stunning ammo capacity of 60 rounds, making it useful for full-auto fire and long combat scenarios. It can be chambered with 5.56x45mm or .300 AAC Blackout rounds, and is compatible with AR-style firearms.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_SigMcx675inch_300ACGN_Description: The 6.75-inch barrel for the SIG MCX, chambered in .300 Blackout, is engineered for ultra-compact configurations, making it ideal for close-quarters scenarios and personal defense. Despite its shorter length, it delivers reliable performance and is optimized for subsonic ammunition, making it perfect for suppressed shooting.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_Svd620mm_762x54SW_Description: The SVD 620mm barrel is a chrome-lined, hammer-forged component designed for exceptional durability and accuracy. Chambered for 7.62×54mmR, it optimizes velocity and effective range. The 24.4-inch (620mm) length strikes a balance between precision and maneuverability, making it ideal for designated marksman roles. Additionally, the barrel is equipped with a distinctive flash suppressor.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_Ar1520inch_556x45PL_Description: This AR-15 barrel boasts a length of 508mm and is specifically crafted for the AR-15 weapon platform. It offers compatibility with various 5.56x45mm cartridges, providing increased accuracy for your firearm.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_M70026inchHeavy_762x51GC_Descript: This 26” barrel is designed for the Remington 700 series rifles and offers easy installation. It has a tapered profile, making it ideal for target shooting. Crafted from high-quality Chromoly steel alloys, each barrel undergoes a meticulous one-at-a-time process to ensure superb accuracy.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_Mossberg50020inch_12GaugRT_Descri: The 20" all-purpose barrel with vent rib is compatible with 12 gauge Mossberg 500 series and Maverick 88 6-shot models. It has a bead sight for quick target acquisition, making it suitable for various shooting scenarios. The smoothbore and matte-blued finish provide reliability and durability.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_SigMcxGN_Description: The SIG MCX is a gas-operated, modular rifle developed by SIG Sauer. It features a short-stroke gas piston system, ensuring reliable suppressed operation across multiple calibers, including .300 Blackout, 5.56×45mm NATO, and 7.62×39mm. The MCX is distinguished by its quick-change barrel system, folding stock, and exceptional adaptability.
KeysToEntries.Receiver_SigMcxGN_Description: The SIG MCX upper receiver is a monolithic aluminum design that serves as the firearm's primary structural component. Unlike conventional AR-15 uppers, the MCX upper integrates the top rail, barrel mounting system, and recoil mechanism into a single, rigid assembly, enhancing durability and performance.
KeysToEntries.GasBlock_Jpgs10DPL_Description: The JPGS-10D is a small and compact design that can fit under various handguard models available on the market. Its two-part structure allows for easy installation, even on barrels with pin-and-weld muzzle treatments.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_SigMcxGN_Description: The SIG MCX Pistol Grip is a high-quality, ergonomic grip designed specifically for the SIG MCX platform. It features a textured surface that improves traction and control, ensuring a secure grip even in demanding conditions.
KeysToEntries.StockAdapter_AkmZenitcoJC_Description: This adapter is designed for attaching PT-1, PT-1S, PT-3, and PT-3S stocks.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_SigMcx12SDGN_Description: The SIG MCX 12-inch SD Handguard is designed to integrate a suppressor, enabling a streamlined, compact, suppressed configuration. This design ensures proper heat ventilation and stability. The SD handguard is ideal for stealth-oriented builds, offering an optimal balance of length, weight, and sound suppression capabilities.
KeysToEntries.Stock_McxMpxTelescopingGN_Description: The SIG Sauer factory replacement telescoping stock for MCX/MPX rifles is engineered for seamless integration with the receiver's 1913 interface, ensuring a straightforward installation process. Its adjustable length allows for a customized fit, providing improved comfort and control during use.
KeysToEntries.Stock_M14EBRStock_Description: This aluminum chassis system features an adjustable buttstock and cheek rest for enhanced ergonomics and shooting stability. It includes integrated Picatinny rails for mounting optics and accessories, and supports folding or collapsible stock configurations.
KeysToEntries.Stock_M1AProMagArchangelStockFDE_Descrip: A reinforced polymer chassis featuring an adjustable cheek riser and length of pull for a tailored fit. Equipped with an ergonomic pistol grip with internal storage, a textured forend with an integrated Picatinny rail, and multiple sling points, it offers improved control and consistent accuracy across varied conditions.
KeysToEntries.Stock_M14EBRStockTan_Description: This aluminum chassis system features an adjustable buttstock and cheek rest for enhanced ergonomics and shooting stability. It includes integrated Picatinny rails for mounting optics and accessories, and supports folding or collapsible stock configurations.
KeysToEntries.Stock_M14EBRStockGrey_Description: This aluminum chassis system features an adjustable buttstock and cheek rest for enhanced ergonomics and shooting stability. It includes integrated Picatinny rails for mounting optics and accessories, and supports folding or collapsible stock configurations.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_M1ASolidCompositeOlive_Descrip: This lightweight composite handguard is crafted from reinforced polymer for excellent heat resistance and durability. Designed for the M1A/M14, it installs easily and maintains proper barrel clearance to preserve accuracy under sustained fire.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_M1ASolidCompositeFDE_Descripti: This lightweight composite handguard is crafted from reinforced polymer for excellent heat resistance and durability. Designed for the M1A/M14, it installs easily and maintains proper barrel clearance to preserve accuracy under sustained fire.
KeysToEntries.Stock_M1AStockWalnutSainedHardWoodBH_Nam: M1A Stock Walnut Sained Hardwood (Black Hawk)
KeysToEntries.Stock_M1AStockWalnutSainedHardWoodBH_Des: This hardwood stock, finished in a rich walnut stain, delivers a traditional look with solid, durable construction. Designed for a stable shoulder fit and comfortable handling, it preserves the traditional feel of the M1A while maintaining reliability in the field.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_M1ASolidCompositeBH_Descriptio: This lightweight composite handguard is crafted from reinforced polymer for excellent heat resistance and durability. Designed for the M1A/M14, it installs easily and maintains proper barrel clearance to preserve accuracy under sustained fire.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_AlienG10Grip_Description: The Alien G10 Grip Panels are precision-engineered, durable G10 composite replacement grips designed for the standard Laugo Arms Alien pistol. The panels offer enhanced grip texture, improved handling, and increased durability.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_Alien_Description: The Laugo Arms Alien is a high-performance 9×19mm competition pistol engineered for unmatched control and precision. It features a fixed barrel and gas-delayed blowback system that eliminates the need for a tilting barrel, significantly reducing recoil and muzzle rise. With an ultra-low bore axis (just 1.7 mm above the grip), the barrel aligns closely with the shooter’s hand for superior stability. A non-reciprocating top rail keeps sights or optics fixed during firing, ensuring consistent accuracy. Built on a monolithic aluminum frame with modular internals, the Alien also includes a crisp, competition-tuned trigger.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_AlienStandard_9x19_Description: This factory-fixed stainless steel semi-bull barrel is integrated directly into the Alien frame. Measuring 4.8 inches in length, the barrel remains stationary during the firing cycle, reducing reciprocating mass and increasing accuracy. Combined with a bore axis just 1.7 mm above the grip and Laugo’s gas-delayed blowback system, this configuration minimizes muzzle rise and enables fast, controlled follow-up shots. It’s the core of the Alien’s signature flat recoil and precision performance.
KeysToEntries.Slide_AlienSlide_Description: The Alien slide is a lightweight internal component that cycles beneath the fixed top rail. It contains the firing mechanism and works in tandem with the gas-delayed blowback system. Unlike traditional full-length slides, its compact, low-mass design reduces reciprocating weight, delivering smoother recoil, faster cycling, and superior shot-to-shot control.
KeysToEntries.Mag_Alien_10Rnd_9x19mm_Description: This 10-round magazine for the Laugo Arms Alien is machined from durable aluminum to ensure consistent feeding, even during rapid fire. Its compact, lightweight design makes it ideal for training, carry, or compliance with magazine capacity limits. Fully compatible with all Alien and Alien Creator models, it delivers smooth, reliable performance without compromising build quality.
KeysToEntries.Slide_AlienToprailIron_Description: <DEV>The Alien Top Rail – Iron Sights is a replaceable upper-rail module that attaches via a single takedown pin. It’s available in Standard or Match variants and includes fiber-optic front sight and adjustable rear iron sights
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_ArchangelAkSeriesTan_Descript: The Archangel AK-series pistol grip is universally compatible with all AK models. Crafted from robust carbon fiber and glass-reinforced polymer in an olive-drab hue, it prioritizes comfort and weapon retention. Boasting a molded front strap and back strap grooves, this grip enhances control and ergonomic feel for improved handling.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_ZenitcoRk3Desert_Description: The RK-3 anatomical pistol grip is made of D16T alloy with a wear-resistant protective coating.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_ZenitcoRk3Green_Description: The RK-3 anatomical pistol grip is made of D16T alloy with a wear-resistant protective coating.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_ZenitcoRk9Desert_Description: The RK-9 anatomical pistol grip is made of D16T alloy and features a wear-resistant protective coating.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_ZenitcoRk9Green_Description: The RK-9 anatomical pistol grip is made of D16T alloy and features a wear-resistant protective coating.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_MagpulMoeGen1FDE_Description: A reliable and ergonomic replacement for the standard AR-15 or AR-10 grip. Constructed with durable polymer, this upgrade enhances control and comfort during handling.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_TorqueFDE_Description: This grip is designed for AR-15 rifles and is both robust and lightweight. Its distinctive skeletal design prioritizes functionality and provides a perfect grip with or without gloves.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_M700GC_Description: The Remington M700 is an accurate and reliable bolt-action rifle widely used by hunters, law enforcement agencies, and military snipers around the world. With a reputation for precision, the M700 is available in various calibers and configurations to suit different shooting applications, from long-range target shooting to big game hunting.
KeysToEntries.Mag_Mp5Standard_30RndRal8k_9x19mm_Descri: A 30-round, curved, all-steel magazine designed for 9mm firearms. It is crafted in Germany and offers robust construction and reliable performance for extended shooting sessions.
KeysToEntries.Mag_Mp5Standard_30RndTin_9x19mm_Descript: A 30-round, curved, all-steel magazine designed for 9mm firearms. It is crafted in Germany and offers robust construction and reliable performance for extended shooting sessions.
KeysToEntries.Mag_Remington700Aics_10Rnd_762x51GC_Desc: The Single Stack Accuracy International Magazine is both durable and corrosion-resistant. It is constructed from steel and features special coatings, while the removable springs and followers make cleaning simple. It can hold ten rounds.
KeysToEntries.Stock_Mp5A2StockGreen_Description: This high-quality MP5 stock, made in the USA, features a rubberized backplate that reduces felt recoil and wear on the carrier, thus enhancing comfort and durability for a smoother shooting experience.
KeysToEntries.Stock_Aks74UM4FoldableGreen_Description: The FAB Defense M4 Folding AKS-74U (Krinkov) Stock is a lightweight, durable stock made from reinforced fiberglass polymer. It features an M4-style tube compatible with various M4/M16 stocks and offers eight adjustable positions for an optimal fit. The folding mechanism enhances portability, and an optional recoil-reducing buffer is included to improve accuracy during rapid fire.
KeysToEntries.Stock_ZenitcoPt1GoldenKhaki_Description: The PT-1 telescopic skeleton stock is designed for the AK series of rifles and features a rubber butt pad and cheek. It is positioned in the standard location where AK stocks typically fold to the side, allowing for tailored adjustments to the shooter's tasks and individual physique.
KeysToEntries.Stock_SksMatadorArmsSabertoothMkIIFDE_De: The SABERTOOTH MK-II boasts a robust, aircraft-grade aluminum build, meticulously machined for straightforward installation across a wide range of SKS variants. Its design promotes versatility, allowing users to personalize their rifles with standard AR-15 pistol grips and buttstocks. Equipped with a sturdy aluminum quad rail handguard, it provides limitless possibilities for accessory mounting. Compatible with diverse SKS models and magazine types, it incorporates a removable dust cap block for effortless maintenance. Additionally, the design incorporates a rear recess to accommodate an optional top-rail mount.
KeysToEntries.Stock_AtiSksStrikeforceTactLiteFDE_Descr: The TactLite Adjustable Stock stands out as one of the lightest six-position adjustable stocks available. Beyond its lightweight design, this innovative stock prioritizes functionality by reducing snag points and providing a secure fit. Crafted from durable DuPont Extreme Temperature Glass Reinforced Polymer, it ensures resilience in diverse environmental conditions.
KeysToEntries.Stock_Ar15ArchangelCheekRiserFDE_Descrip: Raises cheek weld 3/4 inch in height.
KeysToEntries.Stock_MagpulMoeFDE_Description: The MOE Carbine Stock - Mil-Spec model is a replacement buttstock for AR15/M16 carbines that use Mil-Spec-sized receiver extension tubes. Its streamlined A-frame profile is designed for light, fast action and avoids snagging. The release latch is also shielded to prevent accidental activation.
KeysToEntries.Stock_McxMpxStandartFDE_Description: The SIG Sauer factory replacement standard folding visor stock for MCX/MPX rifles is engineered for seamless integration with the receiver's 1913 interface, ensuring a straightforward installation process. The stock features a robust, durable design that enhances overall rifle stability and offers a secure, comfortable shooting experience, even in demanding conditions.
KeysToEntries.Stock_MagpulSgaMossbergStockFDA_Descript: The SGA Stock is a versatile buttstock designed for Mossberg 500/590/590A1 12-gauge shotguns. It offers enhanced adjustability and ergonomics, with an ambidextrous design that allows for easy customization to suit individual preferences.
KeysToEntries.Stock_Rem700MagpulHunterGC_Description: The Hunter 700L Stock for the Remington M700 rifle is made with a reinforced polymer and an anodized aluminum bedding block. It offers complete adjustability in length of pull, comb height, and improved ergonomics.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_RemingtonM870StrikeIndustriesV: Constructed from robust and lightweight 6061 aluminum, this handguard is tailor-made for Remington Model 870 shotguns in 12 gauge.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_MossbergMagpulMoeFDE_Descripti: The MOE M-LOK Forend is designed as a simple replacement for Mossberg 590/590A1 12ga shotguns. It has an elongated design and front/rear hand stops to improve weapon control and maneuverability. The Forend is equipped with M-LOK slots, making it compatible with a wide range of M-LOK accessories.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_Mp5WideForearmGreen_Descriptio: This polymer handguard is designed to match factory HK specifications in the USA for all MP5 & HK94 variants. Also known as the tropical wide forearm, it is marked 'US' inside to verify its compliance with US regulations. Constructed from glass-filled polymer, it matches the quality of its HK German counterparts.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_SigMcx8FDE_Description: The SIG MCX 8-inch handguard is a compact, lightweight accessory designed for short-barreled MCX configurations. It enhances maneuverability, making it ideal for close-quarters engagements. The M-LOK attachment system allows for the mounting of accessories like grips, lights, and lasers without adding unnecessary weight.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_SigMcx10FDE_Description: The SIG MCX 10-inch handguard strikes an optimal balance between compactness and available space for accessories. It enhances the rifle's modularity by providing additional M-LOK slots for customization, all while preserving the firearm's maneuverability.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_SigMcx12SDFDE_Description: The SIG MCX 12-inch SD Handguard is designed to integrate a suppressor, enabling a streamlined, compact, suppressed configuration. This design ensures proper heat ventilation and stability. The SD handguard is ideal for stealth-oriented builds, offering an optimal balance of length, weight, and sound suppression capabilities.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_SigMcx16FDE_Description: The 16-inch SIG MCX Handguard has been engineered for full-length rifle configurations, offering extended modularity for accessory mounting. It provides maximum stability and heat dissipation, rendering it ideal for precision shooting and long-range applications. The M-LOK system ensures compatibility with various attachments while maintaining a lightweight yet durable profile.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_B10B19AkGoldenKhaki_Descriptio: The B-10M handguard milled rail, made from D16T aluminum alloy, seamlessly replaces the standard handguard on a variety of AK platform carbines. Similarly, the B-19 upper handguard milled rail, also machined from D16T aluminum alloy, is designed to sit atop the gas tube on compatible handguards. This combination forms a Picatinny rail over the gas tube without obstructing the line of sight. Together, these handguards form Picatinny rails that provide versatility for attaching additional equipment to the firearm.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_B30B31SAkGoldenKhaki_Descripti: The B-30 handguard rail, machined from D16T coated aluminum alloy, seamlessly replaces the standard handguard on a variety of AK platform rifles. Now in its V2.0 generation, the B-31S upper handguard rail is also machined from D16T aluminum alloy and coated in black or desert color. Designed to attach to the B-30 or B-30U rails with eight screws, it forms a 170±5mm Picatinny rail above the upper handguard and barrel of the AK series, preserving the line of sight.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_DanielDefenseRisII12PL_Descrip: The Daniel Defense RIS II 12 FSP handguard is a high-quality accessory specifically designed for the AR-15 platform. Thanks to its integrated front sight post (FSP), it offers a streamlined and versatile solution for all operators.
KeysToEntries.GasBlock_Akm6P1Sb12GasTubeJC_Description: A standard gas tube compatible with the AK-74 series of rifles. It channels gas from the fired cartridge to a mechanism that disposes of the spent case and inserts a new cartridge into the chamber.
KeysToEntries.Mag_Mp7_40Rnd_46x30SC_Description: The MP7's 40-round magazine maximizes ammunition capacity, extending the duration of sustained fire in situations that require it. However, this increase in capacity comes with a slight increase in weight and size.
KeysToEntries.Mag_Ar15AtiSchmeisserS60_60Rnd_556x45PL_: The S60 ATI Schmeisser magazine has a stunning ammo capacity of 60 rounds, making it useful for full-auto fire and long combat scenarios. It can be chambered with 5.56x45mm or .300 AAC Blackout rounds, and is compatible with AR-style firearms.
KeysToEntries.Mag_PmagAkm_30Rnd_762x39JC_Description: The PMAG 30 AK/AKM MOE is a lightweight and reliable 30-round polymer magazine designed for 7.62x39mm Kalashnikov-pattern rifles, such as the AK-47, AKM, AKS, SIG556R, and similar models. It features a detachable floorplate, consistent curve design, stainless steel spring, and a high-reliability, low-friction follower. The magazine is cost-effective and delivers the reliable performance associated with MOE PMAGs.
KeysToEntries.Mag_MossbergNordicMagazineExt_10Rnd_12Ga: The Nordic Magazine Extension is designed for Mossberg shotguns and has a capacity of 10 rounds. It allows users to carry more rounds for their firearm.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_ZenitcoRk9JC_Description: The RK-9 anatomical pistol grip is made of D16T alloy and features a wear-resistant protective coating.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_MagpulMoeRT_Description: A high-quality polymer grip designed as an upgrade for the AR-15 or M4. Its ergonomic design ensures comfort and improved shooting performance.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_TyrantModPL_Description: Combining the classic feel of an AR grip with a modern design, this grip features polymer straps on the front and back, housed in an aerospace-grade 7075 aluminum body. With a black anodized finish, the result is a lightweight, durable solution with uncompromising form and function.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_MossbergMagpulMoeRT_Descriptio: The MOE M-LOK Forend is designed as a simple replacement for Mossberg 590/590A1 12ga shotguns. It has an elongated design and front/rear hand stops to improve weapon control and maneuverability. The Forend is equipped with M-LOK slots, making it compatible with a wide range of M-LOK accessories.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_MagpulMoeAkJC_Description: The Magpul MOE AK Hand Guard is designed to replace the standard handguard retainer on AK pattern rifles that lack a front sling loop. The product has an extended gripping portion, an integrated heat shield, M-LOK mounting capability, and a replacement gas tube cover.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_AkmnJC_Description: The AKMN is a variant of the AKM that comes equipped with a side rail for use with night vision scopes, as denoted by the 'N' in its name. This model is a popular choice among military forces and armed groups worldwide due to its improved accuracy and versatility.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_DdMk18PL_Description: The DDM4 is a high-quality AR-15 platform developed by Daniel Defense. It is considered one of the best-quality AR-15 platforms on the market due to its precise construction and tight tolerances, which make it very reliable and well-performing. The DDM4 is also fielded by US Rangers.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_Mp7A2SC_Description: The MP7A2, introduced as the latest evolution of the MP7 series, builds upon the original MP7's design with several significant upgrades. These include an improved ergonomic pistol grip, an ambidextrous selector switch for increased versatility, and an enhanced trigger design for better control during rapid fire. The MP7A2 retains the compact and lightweight profile of its predecessor, chambered in 4.6×30mm, while incorporating a fully adjustable stock for greater stability. The addition of a redesigned handguard allows for improved mounting of accessories, while the upgraded Picatinny rails offer more options for customization.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_Mossberg590RT_Description: The Mossberg 590 is a pump-action shotgun celebrated for its ruggedness and reliability. It features a 3-inch chamber and is available in various barrel lengths, typically ranging from 18.5 to 20 inches, catering to different preferences and applications. Designed primarily for defensive and tactical purposes, the Mossberg 590 is equipped with a sturdy receiver and a tang-mounted safety, ensuring quick and intuitive operation, particularly in high-pressure situations. Its dual extractors and twin action bars contribute to smooth cycling and dependable performance, even in harsh conditions.
KeysToEntries.Receiver_FabPdcJC_Description: The PDC is an aluminum dust cover that serves as a replacement for AK/AKM assault rifles. It is equipped with a milled Picatinny scope mount and features a patented retention mechanism that allows for manual adjustment. This ensures a consistent retention of sighting zero and allows for a straightforward and rapid drop-in installation.
KeysToEntries.Receiver_DdA4UpperReceiverPL_Description: The Daniel Defense A4 Upper Receiver Assembly is designed for personalized construction. Crafted with precision in a cutting-edge manufacturing facility and supported by a satisfaction guarantee, this product is ready for any custom build.
KeysToEntries.Stock_ZenitcoPt3JC_Description: The telescopic PT-3 stock is designed for use with the AK series of rifles. It is milled and equipped with a rubber back and cheek pad. The stock is installed in the standard location where AK stocks typically fold to the side. It features a length adjustment mechanism with a range of 5 cm and a customizable cheek rest.
KeysToEntries.Stock_ColtM4BuffertubePL_Description: A receiver extension compatible with the AR-15 platform. It provides a secure mounting point for the stock and aids in mitigating recoil, resulting in enhanced shooting comfort and improved control.
KeysToEntries.Stock_ColtM4BuffertubeRT_Description: A receiver extension compatible with the AR-15 platform. It provides a secure mounting point for the stock and aids in mitigating recoil, resulting in enhanced shooting comfort and improved control.
KeysToEntries.Stock_MagpulCtrPL_Description: An adjustable buttstock compatible with AR-15, M4, and M16 platforms that use MIL-SPEC buffer tubes. It features a friction-lock system to reduce wobble and a shielded release lever to prevent accidental collapse. The slim A-frame profile includes a rubber butt pad and an ambidextrous QD sling mount.
KeysToEntries.Stock_MagpulMoeRT_Description: The MOE Carbine Stock - Mil-Spec model is a replacement buttstock for AR15/M16 carbines that use Mil-Spec-sized receiver extension tubes. Its streamlined A-frame profile is designed for light, fast action and avoids snagging. The release latch is also shielded to prevent accidental activation.
KeysToEntries.StockAdapter_ErgoMossberg500590ARStockAd: The Ergo Grips Mossberg 500/590 Adapter is a polymer accessory that fits securely onto the grip of the Mossberg 500 or 590 shotgun. Its ergonomic design provides a comfortable grip, which enhances accuracy and reduces fatigue during extended shooting sessions. The adapter enables easy customization with a variety of accessories.
KeysToEntries.Handle_AkRp1JC_Description: The RP-1 is a charging handle made from D16T aluminum alloy that improves the ease of reloading the firearm. It is securely attached to the standard charging handle using the provided screws.
KeysToEntries.GasBlock_SigMcxGN_Description: The SIG MCX series utilizes a short-stroke gas piston system combined with a dual recoil spring mechanism, designed to reduce recoil and enhance reliability.
KeysToEntries.Stock_ExtendedRubberButtPadRT_Descriptio: The Extended Rubber Butt-Pad is crafted with a robust rubber material to provide improved grip on the shoulder and enhance impact/drop mitigation.
KeysToEntries.Slide_AlienRetroSlide_Description: The Retro Slide is a specialized slide assembly built for IPSC Production Optics compliance. Unlike the original non-reciprocating rail system, it mounts a red-dot optic directly to the reciprocating slide, allowing the optic to cycle with the slide during firing.
KeysToEntries.Slide_AlienToprailOptic_Description: <DEV>The Alien Top Rail – Optic‑Ready (Standard or Match) is a fixed, non-reciprocating upper rail module designed to attach securely to the frame/barrel assembly.
