It allows mounts for RMS, RTS2, C‑MORE RTS, Trijicon RMRcc footprint optics via adapter plates—independent of the slide’s motion By being stationary and barrel‑locked, the optic stays rock‑solid in zero, never shifting during recoil.
KeysToEntries.Slide_AlienToprailRetro_Description: <DEV>The Alien Creator Retro Top Rail – Match turns your pistol into a slide-mounted optic configuration with competition-spec trigger feel, ideal for Limited Optics divisions while still being easy to install.
KeysToEntries.Mag_Alien_17Rnd_9x19mm_Description: This 17-round magazine serves as the standard high-capacity option for the Laugo Arms Alien pistol. Constructed from durable aluminum, it provides extended firepower while maintaining reliable feeding and balance. Engineered for competition or tactical use, it is fully compatible with all Alien variants and built to complement the pistol’s precision and speed.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_AlienBrassGrip_Description: The Alien Brass Grip Panel Set consists of premium, CNC-machined solid brass panels designed for the standard Laugo Arms Alien pistol. The added weight enhances recoil control and overall handling, while the metallic finish improves aesthetics. Panel thickness closely matches that of the original grips.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_AlienThreaded_9x19_Description: This factory-fitted stainless steel semi-bull threaded barrel is integrated into the Alien frame and allows for suppressor attachment. Measuring 4.8 inches (124 mm), the barrel remains fixed during firing, reducing reciprocating mass and improving accuracy. Its exceptionally low bore axis (just 1.7 mm above the grip), combined with Laugo’s gas-delayed blowback system, virtually eliminates muzzle rise and enhances follow-up shot control. The result is the Alien’s signature flat recoil impulse and precision handling.
KeysToEntries.Auxiliary_AlienMagwell_Description: Designed specifically for the Alien pistol, this flared magwell significantly speeds up magazine changes by guiding the magazine into place with an expanded, funnel-like opening.
KeysToEntries.Slide_Colt1911ComanderSlideAvi_Descripti:
The Fusion Firearms 1911 Commander Carry Slide is a precision CNC-machined component designed for 1911-style pistols. It is crafted from durable 4140 bar-stock steel and heat-treated for enhanced strength, featuring robust combat-style rear serrations and standard dovetail cuts for both front and rear sights, accommodating a variety of sight options.

This is a part of the Colt Commander belonging to Aawut "Viper" Phasuk, the leader of the armed group occupying Pha Lang Airfield.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_Colt1911TheHiveGripsAvi_Descr:
CNC-machined from billet aluminum, this ambidextrous grip is designed to fit full-size 1911 pistols and clones, combining durability with style.

This is a part of the Colt Commander belonging to Aawut "Viper" Phasuk, the leader of the armed group occupying Pha Lang Airfield.
KeysToEntries.Auxiliary_Colt1911CommanderHammerAvi_Des:
This 1911 pistol hammer ensures reliable ignition and smooth operation.

This is a part of the Colt Commander belonging to Aawut "Viper" Phasuk, the leader of the armed group occupying Pha Lang Airfield.
KeysToEntries.Mag_Colt1911_7Rnd_45AcpAvi_Description:
The Colt 1911 Government/Commander Magazine is a high-quality steel magazine designed for the 1911 model pistol. It has a 7-round capacity for .45 ACP ammunition and features a blued finish. This magazine is compatible with several 1911 models, including the Government, Commander, and Gold Cup series.

This is a part of the Colt Commander belonging to Aawut "Viper" Phasuk, the leader of the armed group occupying Pha Lang Airfield.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_Colt1911CommanderAvi_Description:
Introduced in 1949, the Colt Commander was developed as a lightweight, compact alternative to the full-size Colt 1911. It was created in response to a U.S. military request for a smaller, more portable sidearm after World War II. The original model featured an aluminum alloy frame, making it lighter than the traditional steel-framed 1911.

This Colt Commander belongs to Aawut “Viper” Phasuk, the leader of the armed group occupying Pha Lang Airfield. Despite his age, Aawut has made a strong mark among Thai soldiers of fortune. He maintains an image of professionalism in every aspect, even in his sense of style. That’s why he avoided any gaudy designs for his gun, opting instead for a tasteful golden touch.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_Colt1911Comander_45AcpAvi_Descrip:
Made from 416R-certified stainless steel, this barrel is CNC-machined with precise fit points on the back of the receiver and the bottom of the feet, allowing for accurate lock-up and improved performance with simple hand-file fitting.

This is a part of the Colt Commander belonging to Aawut "Viper" Phasuk, the leader of the armed group occupying Pha Lang Airfield.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_Glock17Damascus_Description:
The Glock 17 is a renowned semi-automatic pistol chambered in 9x19mm Parabellum, designed and manufactured by Glock GmbH. It has gained widespread recognition for its exceptional reliability, durability, and ease of use. With a standard magazine capacity of 17 rounds, the Glock 17 offers ample firepower. Its lightweight polymer frame, combined with a steel slide, ensures resilience and comfortable handling. Trusted by professionals and civilians alike, the Glock 17 is a popular choice for self-defense, law enforcement, and sport shooting due to its robust construction and impressive performance.

This Glock 17 belongs to Sang “Kaptei” Samnang, the leader of the armed group occupying the sawmill. A former soldier, Sang values performance and reliability over flashy displays. He purchased this Damascus steel Glock 17 from Banshee when they first began working together. Now, Sang intends to execute him with this very same weapon.
KeysToEntries.Slide_Glock17SlideDamascus_Description:
A slide designed for Glock 9x19 pistols. It serves as a crucial component of the firearm's upper assembly.

This is a part of the Glock 17 belonging to Sang "Kaptei" Samnang, the leader of the armed group occupying the sawmill.
KeysToEntries.Mag_Glock17_17Rnd_9x19mmDamascus_Descrip:
A polymer magazine designed for the Glock 17 pistol. It has a capacity of 17 rounds and is chambered for 9x19mm ammunition.

This is a part of the Glock 17 belonging to Sang "Kaptei" Samnang, the leader of the armed group occupying the sawmill.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_Type51PencilGrips_Description:
This Type 51 Tokarev wooden grip enhances the firearm's aesthetics and functionality. Made from quality hardwood, it provides a comfortable and secure hold, promoting control and accuracy. The grip's timeless design and durable construction add both style and practicality to the pistol.

This is a part of the Type 51 Tokarev belonging to Palani "Colonel" Ketthavong, the military commander of Tiger Bay.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_Type51Pencil_Description:
The Type 51 Tokarev is based on a steel-framed construction, which ensures durability and longevity. It uses a single-stack magazine that can hold eight rounds of 7.62x25mm Tokarev ammunition. The pistol operates on a simple blowback mechanism, which is known for its reliability and ease of maintenance.

This Type 51 Tokarev belongs to Palani "Colonel" Ketthavong, the military commander of Tiger Bay. Once Palani joined the LAF, he used every trick, contact, and lever he possibly had, including blackmail and cheating, to climb to the top. He is a first-class opportunist, and the pistol itself is a custom-made showpiece depicting his favorite animal - a snake. However, he has rarely relied upon it in actual combat.
KeysToEntries.Mag_Type51_8Rnd_762x25Pencil_Description:
A metal box magazine designed for firearms chambered in 7.62x25mm Tokarev. It is known for its durability and typically holds eight rounds, ensuring reliable feeding of ammunition into the firearm.

This is a part of the Type 51 Tokarev belonging to Palani "Colonel" Ketthavong, the military commander of Tiger Bay.
KeysToEntries.Slide_Type51PencilSlide_Description:
The Type 51 Tokarev slide, originating from China, is made of steel, making it durable and resilient. The serrations at the rear offer enhanced grip during manipulation, and the slide itself houses the barrel and recoil spring assembly, facilitating the cycling of the pistol's action. Its robust construction and straightforward design ensure reliable functionality and ease of operation.

This is a part of the Type 51 Tokarev belonging to Palani "Colonel" Ketthavong, the military commander of Tiger Bay.
KeysToEntries.Mag_Colt1911_7Rnd_45AcpMidas_Description:
The Colt 1911 Government/Commander Magazine is a high-quality steel magazine designed for the 1911 model pistol. It has a 7-round capacity for .45 ACP ammunition and features a blued finish. This magazine is compatible with several 1911 models, including the Government, Commander, and Gold Cup series.

This is a part of the Colt 1911 belonging to Songkram "Golden Boy" Manivanh, the leader of the Pha Lang criminal gang.
KeysToEntries.Mag_Type51_8Rnd_762x25Hammerhead_Descrip:
A metal box magazine designed for firearms chambered in 7.62x25mm Tokarev. It is known for its durability and typically holds eight rounds, ensuring reliable feeding of ammunition into the firearm.

This is a part of the Type 51 Tokarev belonging to Sabtu "Naga" bin Panjang, leader of the armed group occupying Ban Pa.
KeysToEntries.Mag_Type51_8Rnd_762x25Mako_Description:
A metal box magazine designed for firearms chambered in 7.62x25mm Tokarev. It is known for its durability and typically holds eight rounds, ensuring reliable feeding of ammunition into the firearm.

This is a part of the Type 51 Tokarev belonging to Makan "Chaonai" Zhang, the leader of the Nam Thaven criminal gang.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_Colt1911GripsMidas_Descriptio:
This grip is designed to fit full-size Colt 1911 pistols and provide a durable, functional replacement or upgrade.

This is a part of the Colt 1911 belonging to Songkram "Golden Boy" Manivanh, the leader of the Pha Lang criminal gang.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_Type51GripsHammerhead_Descrip:
This grip is typically made of durable polymer or plastic materials, providing users with a reliable and cost-effective solution. The straightforward design offers a comfortable and secure hold on the firearm, improving control and accuracy during shooting. The basic Type 51 grip is simple yet practical, ensuring functionality and reliability without sacrificing performance.

This is a part of the Type 51 Tokarev belonging to Sabtu "Naga" bin Panjang, leader of the armed group occupying Ban Pa.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_Type51GripsMako_Description:
This grip is typically made of durable polymer or plastic materials, providing users with a reliable and cost-effective solution. The straightforward design offers a comfortable and secure hold on the firearm, improving control and accuracy during shooting. The basic Type 51 grip is simple yet practical, ensuring functionality and reliability without sacrificing performance.

This is a part of the Type 51 Tokarev belonging to Makan "Chaonai" Zhang, the leader of the Nam Thaven criminal gang.
KeysToEntries.Slide_Type51CMakoSlide_Description:
The Type 51 Tokarev slide, originating from China, is made of steel, making it durable and resilient. The serrations at the rear offer enhanced grip during manipulation, and the slide itself houses the barrel and recoil spring assembly, facilitating the cycling of the pistol's action. Its robust construction and straightforward design ensure reliable functionality and ease of operation.

This is a part of the Type 51 Tokarev belonging to Makan "Chaonai" Zhang, the leader of the Nam Thaven criminal gang.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_Type51Mako_Description:
The Type 51 Tokarev is based on a steel-framed construction, which ensures durability and longevity. It uses a single-stack magazine that can hold eight rounds of 7.62x25mm Tokarev ammunition. The pistol operates on a simple blowback mechanism, which is known for its reliability and ease of maintenance.

This Type 51 Tokarev belongs to Makan "Chaonai" Zhang, the leader of the Nam Thaven criminal gang. Makan received the weapon as a gift from his boss for running a meticulously organized drug operation. Bearing a picture of the father of the nation, Raksmei Sayavong himself, Makan has taken great care of it, seeing it as a symbol of his success. Due to his cautious nature, the pistol still looks brand new.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_AkBakeliteMedved_Description:
A bakelite pistol grip for the AK series of rifles and other compatible firearms.

This is a part of the AK-74N belonging to Arkady "Buran" Vititsky, the military commander of Fort Narith.
KeysToEntries.GasBlock_Akm6P1Sb12GasTubeMedved_Descrip:
A standard gas tube compatible with the AK-74 series of rifles. It channels gas from the fired cartridge to a mechanism that disposes of the spent case and inserts a new cartridge into the chamber.

This is a part of the AK-74N belonging to Arkady "Buran" Vititsky, the military commander of Fort Narith.
KeysToEntries.Receiver_Ak100SeriesDustCoverMedved_Desc:
This is a dust cover for a stamped AK receiver, specifically the original Russian AK-100 model. It is compatible with Saiga and Arsenal rifles.

This is a part of the AK-74N belonging to Arkady "Buran" Vititsky, the military commander of Fort Narith.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_Ak74WoodenMedved_Description:
A wooden handguard for the AK-74.

This is a part of the AK-74N belonging to Arkady "Buran" Vititsky, the military commander of Fort Narith.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_Ak74NMedved_Description:
The AK-74N is a modified variant of the AK-74 rifle, designed with a side rail for attaching night vision scopes, indicated by the 'N' in its name. It is chambered in 5.45x39mm, offering improved accuracy and versatility, especially in low-light conditions. The side rail enables easy integration of night vision optics, allowing users to operate effectively during nighttime operations.

This AK-74N belongs to Arkady “Buran” Vititsky, the military commander of Fort Narith. A proud son of the Russian motherland and a devoted patriot, Arkady had his rifle decorated with traditional Russian lacework. He has always made sure his weapon is kept in perfect condition.
KeysToEntries.Stock_Ak74NWoodenMedved_Description:
A wooden stock for the AK-47, AK-74M and AK-74N.

This is a part of the AK-74N belonging to Arkady "Buran" Vititsky, the military commander of Fort Narith.
KeysToEntries.Mag_IzhmashBlackAk74_30Rnd_545x39Medved_:
This Izhmash-branded 30-Round AK-74 magazine is compatible with standard AK-74 or RPK-74 rifles that accept 5.45x39mm double-stack magazines.

This is a part of the AK-74N belonging to Arkady "Buran" Vititsky, the military commander of Fort Narith.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_Remington78822inch_222_Descriptio: A factory barrel length that is standard on most Model 788 rifles. At 22 inches, the barrel strikes a balance between accuracy, velocity, and handling, making it ideal for hunting varmints.
KeysToEntries.Stock_Remington788Stock_Description: This is a factory hardwood stock for the Remington 788. It is simply designed yet sturdy.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_Remington788_Description: The Remington 788 is a bolt-action hunting rifle produced from 1967 to 1983. Despite being marketed as an affordable model, it is valued for its accuracy. Chambered in .222 Remington, the rifle uses a four-round detachable box magazine. It has a distinctive rear-lugged bolt with a short 60° lift for smooth cycling and easy scope use. Its rigid receiver design enhances precision, making it popular among varmint hunters and target shooters.
KeysToEntries.Mag_Remington788_4Rnd_222_Description: A detachable, single-column steel box magazine designed specifically for the Remington 788, chambered in .222. With a capacity of four rounds, it feeds smoothly into the rifle’s rear-lugged bolt action. It is a compact, reliable, and easy-to-swap magazine that complements the Model 788’s reputation as a simple yet accurate hunting rifle.
KeysToEntries.Receiver_SaVz58ExpertDustCover_Descripti: This high-strength aluminum alloy top cover features an integrated Weaver (MIL-STD-1913) rail and is designed for the Sa vz. 58 rifles chambered in 7.62×39mm and 5.56×45mm. CNC-machined and hard-anodized for durability, it installs without modification using the factory pin, ensuring reliable optic zero retention. The cover remains compatible with standard iron sights and can be quickly removed for maintenance.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_SaVz58Expert_Description: This premium hard-anodized aluminum handguard for the Sa vz. 58, designed by GunExpert in the Czech Republic, features full-length MIL-STD-1913 rails on the top and sides. The side rails are shortened near the rear to allow unobstructed bolt access. The handguard clamps directly to the barrel for a rigid, heat-resistant platform, and the upper section can be removed quickly and without tools via a spring-loaded latch.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_SaVz58FAB_Description: This lightweight, heat-resistant polymer handguard is designed for the Sa vz. 58 rifle. It features a slim, ergonomic profile with M-LOK slots at the six o’clock position for mounting grips, lights, and other accessories. The handguard offers excellent thermal insulation and improved handling under stress. The quick, tool-free installation keeps the weight low while maintaining a streamlined, combat-ready appearance that enhances control without adding bulk.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_SaVz58FABFDE_Description: This lightweight, heat-resistant polymer handguard is designed for the Sa vz. 58 rifle. It features a slim, ergonomic profile with M-LOK slots at the six o’clock position for mounting grips, lights, and other accessories. The handguard offers excellent thermal insulation and improved handling under stress. The quick, tool-free installation keeps the weight low while maintaining a streamlined, combat-ready appearance that enhances control without adding bulk.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_SaVz58300mm_762x39_Description: This precision-engineered 300mm cold-hammer-forged barrel is designed for the Sa vz. 58 rifle and chambered in 7.62×39mm. Crafted from premium barrel steel, it delivers enhanced accuracy and heat resistance in a compact, maneuverable profile. The standard twist rate ensures consistent ballistics and provides a compact carbine-length configuration while maintaining the rifle’s functional reliability.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_SaVz58Polymer_Description: A full-polymer replacement pistol grip for the Sa vz. 58 rifles. Made from glass-fiber-reinforced polymer, it comes complete with a mounting screw and washer. It is dimensionally identical to the original wooden or chipboard grip.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_SaVz58FAB_Description: This glass-fiber-reinforced polymer grip is designed for the Sa vz. 58 rifles. It features finger grooves, a contoured backstrap, and an integrated storage compartment at the base. It installs via the standard Sa vz. 58 grip screw.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_SaVz58FABFDE_Description: This glass-fiber-reinforced polymer grip is designed for the Sa vz. 58 rifles. It features finger grooves, a contoured backstrap, and an integrated storage compartment at the base. It installs via the standard Sa vz. 58 grip screw.
KeysToEntries.Mag_SaVz58_10Rnd_762x39_Description: This Czech-made stamped-steel magazine features a classic gray finish and is precision-engineered for the Sa vz. 58 rifle chambered in 7.62×39mm. It holds 10 rounds and is constructed from hardened steel for maximum durability and reliable feeding. Its low-profile design maintains handling and balance while allowing for quick and secure insertion and extraction.
KeysToEntries.Mag_FabSaVz58_30Rnd_762x39_Description: This lightweight yet durable 30-round polymer magazine is designed for the Sa vz. 58 rifle chambered in 7.62×39mm. Reinforced with internal steel feed lips and a hardened spring, it ensures reliable cartridge feeding. The impact-resistant polymer body provides long-lasting durability. Its slim, ergonomic profile matches the rifle’s contours for smooth handling and fast reloads, delivering extended-capacity performance with minimal weight for field use.
KeysToEntries.Auxiliary_Colt1911HammerMidas_Descriptio:
This 1911 pistol hammer ensures reliable ignition and smooth operation.

This is a part of the Colt 1911 belonging to Songkram "Golden Boy" Manivanh, the leader of the Pha Lang criminal gang.
KeysToEntries.Auxiliary_Colt1911CommanderHammerHel_Des:
This 1911 pistol hammer ensures reliable ignition and smooth operation.

This is a part of the Colt Commander belonging to Malo "Grin" Luangrath, the leader of the armed group occupying Blue Lagoon.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_Colt1911CommanderHel_Description:
Introduced in 1949, the Colt Commander was developed as a lightweight, compact alternative to the full-size Colt 1911. It was created in response to a U.S. military request for a smaller, more portable sidearm after World War II. The original model featured an aluminum alloy frame, making it lighter than the traditional steel-framed 1911.

This Colt Commander belongs to Malo “Grin” Luangrath, the leader of the armed group occupying Blue Lagoon. Using his charm and good looks, he managed to build a lucrative human trafficking network. After the decoration of the gun was finished, Malo sold its creator into slavery to his most perverse customers to ensure the design would never be replicated.
KeysToEntries.Slide_Colt1911ComanderSlideHel_Descripti:
The Fusion Firearms 1911 Commander Carry Slide is a precision CNC-machined component designed for 1911-style pistols. It is crafted from durable 4140 bar-stock steel and heat-treated for enhanced strength, featuring robust combat-style rear serrations and standard dovetail cuts for both front and rear sights, accommodating a variety of sight options.

This is a part of the Colt Commander belonging to Malo "Grin" Luangrath, the leader of the armed group occupying Blue Lagoon.
KeysToEntries.Mag_Colt1911_7Rnd_45AcpHel_Description:
The Colt 1911 Government/Commander Magazine is a high-quality steel magazine designed for the 1911 model pistol. It has a 7-round capacity for .45 ACP ammunition and features a blued finish. This magazine is compatible with several 1911 models, including the Government, Commander, and Gold Cup series.

This is a part of the Colt Commander belonging to Malo "Grin" Luangrath, the leader of the armed group occupying Blue Lagoon.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_Colt1911Comander_45AcpHel_Descrip:
Made from 416R-certified stainless steel, this barrel is CNC-machined with precise fit points on the back of the receiver and the bottom of the feet, allowing for accurate lock-up and improved performance with simple hand-file fitting.

This is a part of the Colt Commander belonging to Malo "Grin" Luangrath, the leader of the armed group occupying Blue Lagoon.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_Colt1911PlasticGripsHel_Descr:
CNC-machined from billet aluminum, this ambidextrous grip is designed to fit full-size 1911 pistols and clones, combining durability with style.

This is a part of the Colt Commander belonging to Malo "Grin" Luangrath, the leader of the armed group occupying Blue Lagoon.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_BerettaM9A1Blackmail_Description:
The Beretta M9A1, introduced in 2006 as an upgraded version of the M9, is a 9mm semi-automatic pistol. It features a Picatinny rail for accessory mounting, improved grip texturing, a beveled magazine well for faster reloading, and sand-resistant 15-round magazines. Designed for military and law enforcement use, the M9A1 is renowned for its enhanced reliability and adaptability in harsh conditions.

This Beretta M9A1 belongs to Hoang “Broker” Lam Nam, the leader of the armed group occupying Hunter’s Paradise. He procured the elegant pistol early in his criminal career through a string of well-orchestrated blackmail schemes, and ever since has paraded it at every opportunity so his subordinates know who’s in charge. However, he has rarely used it.
KeysToEntries.Auxiliary_BerettaM9A1HammerBlackmail_Des:
The Beretta hammer is an integral part of the firing mechanism, serving the primary function of striking the firing pin to initiate the firing process.

This is a part of the M9A1 belonging to Hoang "Broker" Lam Nam, the leader of the armed group occupying Hunter's Paradise.
KeysToEntries.Mag_BerettaM9A1_15Rnd_9x19Blackmail_Desc:
The Beretta M9A1 9mm 15-round magazine is a factory-original accessory designed to ensure optimal performance and reliability for the Beretta pistol. Constructed from durable steel with a corrosion-resistant finish, it is built to withstand strenuous use and harsh environmental conditions.

This is a part of the M9A1 belonging to Hoang "Broker" Lam Nam, the leader of the armed group occupying Hunter's Paradise.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_BerettaM9A1Blackmail_Descript:
This Beretta M9A1 grip is designed to provide a comfortable and secure hold. 

This is a part of the M9A1 belonging to Hoang "Broker" Lam Nam, the leader of the armed group occupying Hunter's Paradise.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_BerettaM9A1ThreadedBlackmail_Desc:
A threaded barrel for the Beretta M9 model is an extended barrel designed to accommodate muzzle devices such as suppressors or compensators. These barrels are distinguished by a 1/2x28 thread pitch, a prevalent standard for 9mm firearms.

This is a part of the M9A1 belonging to Hoang "Broker" Lam Nam, the leader of the armed group occupying Hunter's Paradise.
KeysToEntries.Slide_BerettaM9A1Blackmail_Description:
The Beretta M9A1 slide is crafted from durable steel and features an open-top design, which helps prevent jamming by allowing spent casings to eject more freely. This design also contributes to reduced felt recoil and improved cycling reliability.

This is a part of the M9A1 belonging to Hoang "Broker" Lam Nam, the leader of the armed group occupying Hunter's Paradise.
KeysToEntries.Mag_Remington700Pmag_10Rnd_762x51Camo_De:
The PMAG 10 7.62 AC is a durable polymer magazine that holds ten rounds and is designed for .308 Winchester cartridges. It is compatible with short-action AICS-spec bottom metal, including the Bolt Action Magazine Well for the Hunter 700 Stock. The magazine features a paint-pen dot matrix for easy identification and a flared base plate for enhanced control and quick retrieval.

This is a part of the Remington M700 belonging to Bane "Yen" Seeha, the military commander of Midnight Sapphire.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_M70022inchStandart_762x51Camo_Des:
A 22" barrel for the Remington M700 with a unique triangular profile and built-in muzzle brake. This design delivers both on aesthetics and accuracy, providing a balanced mix of maneuverability and bullet velocity.

This is a part of the Remington M700 belonging to Bane "Yen" Seeha, the military commander of Midnight Sapphire.
KeysToEntries.Stock_Rem700MagpulHunterCamo_Description:
The Hunter 700L Stock for the Remington M700 rifle is made with a reinforced polymer and an anodized aluminum bedding block. It offers complete adjustability in length of pull, comb height, and improved ergonomics.

This is a part of the Remington M700 belonging to Bane "Yen" Seeha, the military commander of Midnight Sapphire.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_Ak308HT_Description: The AK-308 is a recent addition to the Kalashnikov family, designed for use with the 7.62x51mm NATO cartridge. It is based on the AK-12 platform but adapted to accommodate the larger NATO round. The AK-308 features modern enhancements such as a folding and adjustable buttstock, an ergonomic pistol grip, and an extended Picatinny rail for optics and accessories. It maintains the renowned reliability and durability of the AK series while offering increased firepower and precision suitable for various tactical and military applications.
KeysToEntries.StockAdapter_ZenitcoPtAk74M100HT_Descrip: Designed for attaching PT-1, PT-1S, PT-3, and PT-3S stocks.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_AkRatnikHT_Description: The Ratnik Pistol Grip is made of durable polymer and has an integrated trigger guard. Designed specifically to be compatible with the Ratnik series, it provides an ergonomic and durable grip for improved handling and control.
KeysToEntries.Receiver_AkRatnikDustCoverHT_Description: The dust cover for the AK ratnik series is a modernized component designed to enhance the functionality of this advanced assault rifles. It is manufactured by Izhmash and features an integrated Picatinny rail, which provides a stable platform for mounting various optical sights and accessories. This integration significantly improves the rifle's versatility and adaptability in different operational scenarios.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_AkRatnik308HT_Description: An essential feature of the AK-308 rifle, this handguard is designed for improved ergonomics and tactical flexibility, allowing the user to mount various accessories such as optics, grips, and lights.
KeysToEntries.GasBlock_AkRatnikGasTubeHT_Description: The Ratnik gas tube is a key component of the AK Ratnik series of rifles. It directs gas from the fired cartridge to the gas piston, which drives the bolt carrier backward to cycle the action.
KeysToEntries.Stock_ZenitcoPt3HT_Description: The telescopic PT-3 stock is designed for use with the AK series of rifles. It is milled and equipped with a rubber back and cheek pad. The stock is installed in the standard location where AK stocks typically fold to the side. It features a length adjustment mechanism with a range of 5 cm and a customizable cheek rest.
KeysToEntries.Mag_Ak308_20Rnd_762x51HT_Description: The new AK-308 20-round magazine designed for 7.62x51 mm rifles. Developed by izhmash, it adheres to strict military standards. This magazine features a robust stamped steel AK-308 angled baseplate and a unique double detent mag insert for secure locking. Constructed from lightweight, impact-resistant polymer, it ensures durability in various temperatures.
KeysToEntries.Slide_M201CSlidePsycho_Description:
A steel slide assembly for the M-201C 9×19 mm pistol. It includes front and rear serrations for improved manipulation and houses the barrel bushing, recoil spring plug, and striker components. It is designed for use with the standard M-201C barrel and recoil assembly.

This is a part of the M-201C belonging to Kahoku "Bloodhound" Phongsa, the leader of the Kiu Vongsa criminal gang.
KeysToEntries.Mag_M201c_8Rnd_9x19Psycho_Description:
A dependable steel magazine designed for the M-201C pistol chambered in 9x19mm. With an eight-round capacity, it strikes a balance between lightweight portability and reliable feeding performance.

This is a part of the M-201C belonging to Kahoku "Bloodhound" Phongsa, the leader of the Kiu Vongsa criminal gang.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_M201CPsychoGrips_Description:
A black polymer pistol grip for the M-201C pistol.

This is a part of the M-201C belonging to Kahoku "Bloodhound" Phongsa, the leader of the Kiu Vongsa criminal gang.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_M201CPsycho_Description:
The Norinco M201-C is a 9mm semi-automatic pistol inspired by the Soviet Tokarev TT-33. Produced by China's Norinco, it modernizes the original with a manual safety, ergonomic grip, and chambering for contemporary 9×19mm ammunition, making it compatible with widely available modern ammo.

This Norinco M201-C belongs to Kahoku “Bloodhound” Phongsa, the leader of the Kiu Vongsa criminal gang. After escaping death row, Kahoku killed a police officer and took his weapon. Since then, he has carved a notch for every person he has murdered with it.
KeysToEntries.GasBlock_Aks74UGasTubeFather_Description:
The gas tube of the AK-74 rifle is a crucial component that is situated above the barrel. It operates the rifle's gas-operated action by channeling propellant gasses to drive the piston, cycle the action, and aid in the extraction and ejection of spent cartridges.

This is a part of the AKS-74U belonging to Lani "Firebrand" Sayavong, the leader of the armed group occupying YBL-1.
KeysToEntries.Receiver_Aks74UFather_Description:
The upper receiver cover for the AKS-74U with an integrated rear sight.

This is a part of the AKS-74U belonging to Lani "Firebrand" Sayavong, the leader of the armed group occupying YBL-1.
KeysToEntries.Mag_IzhmashBakeliteAk74_30Rnd_545x39Fath:
A Russian 5.45x39mm bakelite magazine with a capacity of 30 rounds.

This is a part of the AKS-74U belonging to Lani "Firebrand" Sayavong, the leader of the armed group occupying YBL-1.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_Aks74UFather_Description:
The AKS-74U is a compact, short-barreled variant of the AK-74 assault rifle, developed by the Soviet Union in the late 1970s. With a 210mm barrel and folding metal stock, it is highly portable and ideal for close-quarters combat. Chambered for the 5.45x39mm cartridge, it delivers the firepower of the full-size AK-74 in a more compact form. The weapon’s distinctive muzzle brake reduces recoil and muzzle rise. Favored by paratroopers, vehicle crews, and special forces, it strikes a perfect balance between power and maneuverability.

This AKS-74U belongs to Lani “Firebrand” Sayavong, the leader of the armed group occupying YBL-1. Hardened by years on the run, sleeping in caves, and fighting in the dense jungle, Lani carries a weapon that looks just as battered by life as he is. The gun is adorned with national symbols and revolutionary slogans of his rebel group, the Lamang Liberation Army.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_AkPolymerFather_Description:
A polymer pistol grip designed for use with the AK series of rifles and other compatible firearms. It was designed as a replacement for the obsolete bakelite grip.

This is a part of the AKS-74U belonging to Lani "Firebrand" Sayavong, the leader of the armed group occupying YBL-1.
KeysToEntries.Stock_Aks74UFoldableFather_Description:
The AKS-74U Side-Folding Triangle Stock is a rugged and practical upgrade for AK-series rifles. Made from high-quality steel, it features a classic triangle design that ensures both durability and stability.

This is a part of the AKS-74U belonging to Lani "Firebrand" Sayavong, the leader of the armed group occupying YBL-1.
KeysToEntries.Mag_IzhmashBlackAk74_30Rnd_545x39Father_:
This Izhmash-branded Super Black (True Black) 30-Round AK-74 magazine is compatible with standard AK-74 or RPK-74 rifles that accept 5.45x39mm double-stack magazines.

This is a part of the AKS-74U belonging to Lani "Firebrand" Sayavong, the leader of the armed group occupying YBL-1.
KeysToEntries.Mag_Mp5Standard_15Rnd_9x19mm_Description: A 15-round, curved, all-steel magazine designed for 9mm firearms. It is crafted in Germany and offers robust construction and reliable performance.
KeysToEntries.Mag_Mp5Standard_15RndRal8k_9x19mm_Descri: A 15-round, curved, all-steel magazine designed for 9mm firearms. It is crafted in Germany and offers robust construction and reliable performance.
KeysToEntries.Stock_McmillanA5_Description: The A-5 stock features a beavertail forearm and a trim pistol grip; its lowered bore axis improves stability when firing.
KeysToEntries.Mag_SvdDragunov_20Rnd_762x54SW_Descripti: This high-capacity steel magazine is designed for extended engagements with the SVD Dragunov, offering increased firepower. With a 20-round capacity for 7.62×54mmR, it ensures durability and reliability while enhancing the rifle's sustained fire capability.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_SvdDragunovSW_Description: The Dragunov sniper rifle is a semi-automatic designated marksman rifle chambered in 7.62×54mmR, developed in the Soviet Union between 1957 and 1963. It was chosen as the winning design from a competition involving three design teams. After extensive field testing in various environmental conditions, Dragunov's rifle was officially adopted in July 1963. An initial pre-production batch of 200 rifles was assembled for evaluation, and serial production began in 1964 at Izhmash, later known as Kalashnikov Concern. Since then, the Dragunov has become a standard squad support weapon in numerous countries, including former Warsaw Pact nations.
KeysToEntries.Receiver_SagSvdMLokChassisMk1SW_Descript: This high-performance receiver is an upgrade for the Dragunov SVD, enhancing modularity, ergonomics, and accessory compatibility. Made from lightweight yet durable aluminum, it features M-LOK mounting slots and an improved rail system for optics. It also significantly enhances handling and customization, making the SVD more adaptable for tactical and precision shooting applications.
KeysToEntries.StockAdapter_SvdArmaconSW_Description: The Armacon SVD/Tigr to M4 Stock Adapter is a precision-engineered accessory that enhances the versatility of SVD and Tigr rifles. It replaces the standard fixed stock with an AR-15-style buffer tube assembly, allowing for the attachment of adjustable M4-style stocks. Built from durable materials, it ensures a secure fit without requiring permanent modifications to the rifle.
KeysToEntries.Stock_ColtM4BuffertubeSW_Description: A receiver extension compatible with the AR-15 platform. It provides a secure mounting point for the stock and aids in mitigating recoil, resulting in enhanced shooting comfort and improved control.
KeysToEntries.Stock_DanielDefenseAdjustableSW_Descript: The Daniel Defense adjustable buttstock is made of a unique blend of glass-infused polymers and finished with soft-touch rubber in strategic areas. It is precision-formed for Mil-Spec receiver extensions, minimizing forward or lateral play that is often found in other buttstocks. This eliminates the need for a tensioning device or friction lock.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_SagSvdMLokChassisMk1SW_Descrip: Designed to enhance the Dragunov SVD’s ergonomics and precision, the MK1 chassis is crafted from durable aluminum, providing improved modularity and enabling easier customization with modern accessories. It ensures consistent accuracy and improved handling, making it an ideal choice for both tactical and precision shooting.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_DanielDefenseEnhancedArSW_Nam: DD Enhanced AR Pistol Grip (Silent Watch)
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_DanielDefenseEnhancedArSW_Des: The Daniel Defense Pistol Grip is ideal for the AR-15 platform, with an ergonomic design that ensures superior control and ease of use. Its classic 1911 grip angle allows for a comfortable hand position.
KeysToEntries.Handguard_Aks74UWoodenFather_Description:
A wooden handguard for the AK-74U.

This is a part of the AKS-74U belonging to Lani "Firebrand" Sayavong, the leader of the armed group occupying YBL-1.
KeysToEntries.Handle_AkRp1HT_Description: The RP-1 is a charging handle made from D16T aluminum alloy that improves the ease of reloading the firearm. It is securely attached to the standard charging handle using the provided screws.
KeysToEntries.GasBlock_Ak74GasTubeMedved_Description:
The gas tube of the AK-74 rifle is a crucial component that is situated above the barrel. It operates the rifle's gas-operated action by channeling propellant gasses to drive the piston, cycle the action, and aid in the extraction and ejection of spent cartridges.

his is a part of the AK-74N belonging to Arkady "Buran" Vititsky, the military commander of Fort Narith.
KeysToEntries.Receiver_AkRatnik308DustCoverHT_Descript: Designed for the AK-308 rifle, this dust cover features a locking lever to ensure a secure fit which is critical for maintaining stability when mounting optics.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_Colt1911Comander_45AcpThreadedAvi:
Made from 416R-certified stainless steel, this barrel is CNC-machined with precise fit points on the back of the receiver and the bottom of the feet, allowing for accurate lock-up and improved performance with simple hand-file fitting.

This is a part of the Colt Commander belonging to Aawut "Viper" Phasuk, the leader of the armed group occupying Pha Lang Airfield.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_M201cgripsPsycho_Description:
A black polymer pistol grip for the M-201C pistol.

This is a part of the M-201C belonging to Kahoku "Bloodhound" Phongsa, the leader of the Kiu Vongsa criminal gang.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_M14BH_Description: The M14 is a 7.62×51mm NATO, gas-operated, magazine-fed battle rifle developed in the United States and adopted in 1959. It features a rotating bolt and selective-fire capability, though most rifles were issued in semi-automatic only. With a 20-round detachable box magazine, the M14 gained a reputation for reliability and long-range effectiveness. It saw extensive use during the early stages of the Vietnam War and remains in limited service today, particularly as a designated marksman rifle.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_M1A16inch_762x51BH_Description: This 16.25-inch steel barrel is designed for the SOCOM-16 variant of the M1A and is chambered in .308 Winchester/7.62×51 NATO. Its shorter length makes it well-suited for close-quarters use while maintaining reliable accuracy and durability.
KeysToEntries.Mag_SpringfieldM1A_20Rnd_762x51BH_Descri: This 20-round factory-spec magazine is made in the USA and fits all Springfield M1A and military-style M14 rifles. It features a heat-treated steel body with a black oxide or blued finish, a chrome-silicone spring, and a polymer follower for consistent, reliable feeding.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_AlienBlack_Description: The Laugo Arms Alien is a high-performance 9×19mm competition pistol engineered for unmatched control and precision. It features a fixed barrel and gas-delayed blowback system that eliminates the need for a tilting barrel, significantly reducing recoil and muzzle rise. With an ultra-low bore axis (just 1.7 mm above the grip), the barrel aligns closely with the shooter’s hand for superior stability. A non-reciprocating top rail keeps sights or optics fixed during firing, ensuring consistent accuracy. Built on a monolithic aluminum frame with modular internals, the Alien also includes a crisp, competition-tuned trigger.
KeysToEntries.Stock_PRSGen3Stock_Description: A rugged precision rifle stock with tool-free adjustments for cheek height and length of pull, designed to improve stability and shooter fit on AR-pattern platforms. Built to stay locked under recoil and sustained fire in harsh conditions.
KeysToEntries.Stock_PRSGen3StockFDE_Description: A rugged precision rifle stock with tool-free adjustments for cheek height and length of pull, designed to improve stability and shooter fit on AR-pattern platforms. Built to stay locked under recoil and sustained fire in harsh conditions.
KeysToEntries.Stock_MoeSLSCarbineStock_Description: A slim carbine stock with ambidextrous quick-adjust latches and dual waterproof storage compartments. Designed to improve cheek weld and handling while minimizing noise, with anti-rattle fit and versatile sling attachment options for reliable performance in the field.
KeysToEntries.Stock_MoeSLSCarbineStockFDE_Description: A slim carbine stock with ambidextrous quick-adjust latches and dual waterproof storage compartments. Designed to improve cheek weld and handling while minimizing noise, with anti-rattle fit and versatile sling attachment options for reliable performance in the field.
KeysToEntries.Mag_AcUnityMp5_40Rnd_9x19mm_Description: A 40-round, curved, all-steel magazine designed for 9mm firearms. It is crafted in Germany and offers robust construction and reliable performance for extended shooting sessions.
KeysToEntries.Handle_SrandartM16A1_Description: An M16A1 mil-spec charging handle assembly designed for standard AR-15 rifles.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_M16A120inch_556x45_Description: A standard-length lightweight barrel designed for maximum muzzle velocity and improved accuracy at extended ranges. Its 20-inch profile enhances projectile stability and effective engagement distance while maintaining manageable recoil and consistent shot performance. It offers compatibility with various 5.56x45mm cartridges.
KeysToEntries.GasBlock_StandardM16A1_Description: A standard gas block for the M16A1 carbine. As an essential component, it effectively regulates the flow of gas from the fired cartridge to ensure proper cycling of the weapon's mechanism. It also features a front sight post.
KeysToEntries.PistolGrip_M16A1_Description: A standard M16A1 pistol grip designed for AR-15/M16 pattern rifles.
KeysToEntries.Stock_M700HSPrecision2000Black_Descripti: The H-S Precision Pro-Series 2000 M24 A1 Tactical Stock is a precision-engineered upgrade for the Remington M700 rifle. It is designed for durability and accuracy, with a classic ergonomic design that offers good grip and maneuverability.
KeysToEntries.Stock_M700HSPrecision2000Olive_Descripti: The H-S Precision Pro-Series 2000 M24 A1 Tactical Stock is a precision-engineered upgrade for the Remington M700 rifle. It is designed for durability and accuracy, with a classic ergonomic design that offers good grip and maneuverability.
KeysToEntries.Stock_SteyrAugStock_Description: <DEV>An integral polymer bullpup stock that houses the trigger group and magazine well, engineered for compact balance and natural shouldering. Built-in cheek rest and rugged construction provide stable sighting and recoil control, making the AUG’s signature configuration both reliable and comfortable across varied combat scenarios.
KeysToEntries.Barrel_SteyrAug20inch_556x45_Description: <DEV>A full-length cold-hammer-forged 20″ barrel chambered in 5.56×45 NATO, built for maximized muzzle velocity and sustained accuracy at extended ranges. With chrome-lined bore and durable construction, this barrel pushes rounds flatter and retains energy downrange, making it ideal for open-terrain engagements and precise fire missions.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_SteyrAug_Description: <DEV>A pioneering bullpup assault rifle developed in Austria in the late 1970s. The original Steyr AUG,chambered in 5.56x45 features a compact polymer body, integrated optics, and a cold hammer–forged barrel, delivering excellent accuracy in a short overall length. Designed for modern infantry combat, it offers reliable performance in close quarters while maintaining effective range and control.
KeysToEntries.Receiver_SigMcxFDE_Description: The SIG MCX upper receiver is a monolithic aluminum design that serves as the firearm's primary structural component. Unlike conventional AR-15 uppers, the MCX upper integrates the top rail, barrel mounting system, and recoil mechanism into a single, rigid assembly, enhancing durability and performance.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_SigMcxFDE_Description: The SIG MCX is a gas-operated, modular rifle developed by SIG Sauer. It features a short-stroke gas piston system, ensuring reliable suppressed operation across multiple calibers, including .300 Blackout, 5.56×45mm NATO, and 7.62×39mm. The MCX is distinguished by its quick-change barrel system, folding stock, and exceptional adaptability.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_AkmnFDE_Description: The AKMN is a variant of the AKM that comes equipped with a side rail for use with night vision scopes, as denoted by the 'N' in its name. This model is a popular choice among military forces and armed groups worldwide due to its improved accuracy and versatility.
KeysToEntries.Receiver_SaVz58ExpertDustCoverFDE_Name: Sa vz. 58 Expert Dust Cover FDE
KeysToEntries.Receiver_SaVz58ExpertDustCoverFDE_Descri: This high-strength aluminum alloy top cover features an integrated Weaver (MIL-STD-1913) rail and is designed for the Sa vz. 58 rifles chambered in 7.62×39mm and 5.56×45mm. CNC-machined and hard-anodized for durability, it installs without modification using the factory pin, ensuring reliable optic zero retention. The cover remains compatible with standard iron sights and can be quickly removed for maintenance.
KeysToEntries.Receiver_FabPdcFDE_Description: The PDC is an aluminum dust cover that serves as a replacement for AK/AKM assault rifles. It is equipped with a milled Picatinny scope mount and features a patented retention mechanism that allows for manual adjustment. This ensures a consistent retention of sighting zero and allows for a straightforward and rapid drop-in installation.
KeysToEntries.Receiver_ColtM4UpperReceiverFDE_Descript: An upper receiver for the M4 series of rifles. The Picatinny rail allows for the attachment of optics and various additional devices.
KeysToEntries.Receiver_DdA4UpperReceiverBlack_Descript: The Daniel Defense A4 Upper Receiver Assembly is designed for personalized construction. Crafted with precision in a cutting-edge manufacturing facility and supported by a satisfaction guarantee, this product is ready for any custom build.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_Ak74NFDE_Description: The AK-74N is a modified variant of the AK-74 rifle, designed with a side rail for attaching night vision scopes, indicated by the 'N' in its name. It is chambered in 5.45x39mm, offering improved accuracy and versatility, especially in low-light conditions. The side rail enables easy integration of night vision optics, allowing users to operate effectively during nighttime operations.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_ColtM4A1FDE_Description: The M4A1, in service since 1994, is a fully automatic variant of the M4 carbine widely utilized by U.S. special operations forces. This highly regarded rifle offers exceptional performance and reliability, with a selective fire system that allows operators to switch between semi-automatic and fully automatic modes. Its compact size, collapsible stock, and compatibility with various accessories make it ideal for close-quarters combat and versatile for various mission requirements.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_DdMk18Black_Description: The DDM4 is a high-quality AR-15 platform developed by Daniel Defense. It is considered one of the best-quality AR-15 platforms on the market due to its precise construction and tight tolerances, which make it very reliable and well-performing. The DDM4 is also fielded by US Rangers.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_Mossberg590FDE_Description: The Mossberg 590 is a pump-action shotgun celebrated for its ruggedness and reliability. It features a 3-inch chamber and is available in various barrel lengths, typically ranging from 18.5 to 20 inches, catering to different preferences and applications. Designed primarily for defensive and tactical purposes, the Mossberg 590 is equipped with a sturdy receiver and a tang-mounted safety, ensuring quick and intuitive operation, particularly in high-pressure situations. Its dual extractors and twin action bars contribute to smooth cycling and dependable performance, even in harsh conditions.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_RemingtonM870FDE_Description: The Remington Model 870 is a classic pump-action shotgun known for its reliability, versatility, and widespread use in various applications such as hunting, sport shooting, and law enforcement. It features a robust and durable design, with a variety of configurations available to suit different preferences and needs. The Model 870 is celebrated for its smooth cycling action, solid construction, and proven performance, making it a popular choice among firearm enthusiasts worldwide.
KeysToEntries.Firearm_SaVz58FDE_Description: The Sa vz. 58 (7,62mm samopal vzor 58) is a 7.62×39mm assault rifle developed in Czechoslovakia in the late 1950s. Despite its visual similarity to the Soviet AK-47, the vz. 58 is a completely independent design, sharing no interchangeable parts with the Kalashnikov. It uses a short-stroke gas piston system, a milled steel receiver, and a distinctive linear hammer-fired mechanism with a hinged bolt locking piece. Compared to the AK-47, it is lighter and features a bolt hold-open device that engages after the final round is fired.
